usageTranslations.vi: Chủ hàng phải giao container trong khung thời gian tàu chạy để đảm bảo xếp hàng đúng giờ.
usageTranslations.hi: शिपर्स को समय पर पोत लोडिंग के लिए सेलिंग विंडो के भीतर कंटेनर डिलीवर करने होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ส่งสินค้าต้องส่งตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ภายในช่วงเวลาขาออกเพื่อให้การโหลดเรือตรงเวลา
usageTranslations.id: Shipper harus mengirimkan kontainer dalam jendela keberangkatan untuk memastikan pemuatan kapal tepat waktu.

terms.definition: A short-sea or coastal shipping service that transfers cargo between smaller regional ports and larger hub ports.
terms.usage: The port relies on feeder service to connect local cargo to major international shipping routes.

termTranslations.th: บริการขนส่งต่อ

usageTranslations.en: The port relies on feeder service to connect local cargo to major international shipping routes.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman, yerel yükleri büyük uluslararası deniz yollarına bağlamak için feeder servisine güvenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le port s'appuie sur le service feeder pour connecter la cargaison locale aux principales routes maritimes internationales.
usageTranslations.de: Der Hafen ist auf Feederdienste angewiesen, um lokale Ladung mit den großen internationalen Schifffahrtsrouten zu verbinden.
usageTranslations.es: El puerto depende del servicio alimentador para conectar la carga local con las principales rutas marítimas internacionales.
usageTranslations.zh: 港口依靠支线服务将本地货物连接到主要国际航线。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتمد الميناء على خدمة التغذية لربط البضائع المحلية بمسارات الشحن الدولية الرئيسية.
usageTranslations.pt: O porto depende do serviço feeder para conectar cargas locais às principais rotas marítimas internacionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Порт полагается на фидерную службу для подключения местных грузов к основным международным судоходным маршрутам.
usageTranslations.ja: 港は、地域貨物を主要な国際航路につなぐためにフィーダーサービスに依存している。
usageTranslations.it: Il porto si affida al servizio feeder per collegare i carichi locali alle principali rotte marittime internazionali.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng phụ thuộc vào dịch vụ chuyển tải để kết nối hàng hóa địa phương với các tuyến hàng hải quốc tế lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: बंदरगाह स्थानीय माल को प्रमुख अंतरराष्ट्रीय शिपिंग मार्गों से जोड़ने के लिए फीडर सेवा पर निर्भर करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือพึ่งพาบริการขนส่งต่อในการเชื่อมโยงสินค้าท้องถิ่นกับเส้นทางเดินเรือระหว่างประเทศหลัก
usageTranslations.id: Pelabuhan mengandalkan layanan feeder untuk menghubungkan kargo lokal ke jalur pelayaran internasional utama.

terms.definition: A formal alert sent by carrier or freight forwarder to the named consignee informing them that the cargo has arrived or is ready for pickup at a specified location.
terms.usage: The freight forwarder issued a consignee notification upon arrival of the shipment at the Rotterdam port terminal.

termTranslations.th: การแจ้งผู้รับสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: The freight forwarder issued a consignee notification upon arrival of the shipment at the Rotterdam port terminal.
usageTranslations.tr: Nakliye acentesi, gönderi Rotterdam liman terminaline vardığında alıcı bildirimi yaptı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transitaire a émis un avis au destinataire à l’arrivée de l’envoi au terminal portuaire de Rotterdam.
usageTranslations.de: Der Spediteur stellte eine Empfängerbenachrichtigung bei Ankunft der Sendung im Rotterdamer Hafen aus.
usageTranslations.es: El agente de carga emitió una notificación al consignatario a la llegada del envío al puerto de Róterdam.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运代理在货物到达鹿特丹港码头时向收货人发出了通知。
usageTranslations.ar: أصدر وكيل الشحن إشعارًا للمستلم عند وصول الشحنة إلى محطة ميناء روتردام.
usageTranslations.pt: O despachante emitiu uma notificação ao consignatário quando a carga chegou ao terminal do porto de Roterdã.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспедитор выдал уведомление грузополучателю по прибытии груза в порт Роттердама.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物がロッテルダム港のターミナルに到着すると、フォワーダーは荷受人に通知を発行した。
usageTranslations.it: Lo spedizioniere ha emesso una notifica al destinatario all'arrivo della spedizione al terminal portuale di Rotterdam.
usageTranslations.vi: Người giao nhận hàng đã gửi thông báo cho người nhận khi lô hàng đến bến cảng Rotterdam.
usageTranslations.hi: रॉटरडैम पोर्ट टर्मिनल पर शिपमेंट पहुंचने पर फ्रेट फॉरवर्डर ने प्राप्तकर्ता सूचना जारी की।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ส่งต่อออกใบแจ้งผู้รับเมื่อสินค้ามาถึงท่าเรือรอตเตอร์ดัม
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan pengiriman mengirim pemberitahuan kepada penerima saat kiriman tiba di pelabuhan Rotterdam.

terms.definition: The weight of an empty container, vehicle, or packaging material, excluding the weight of its contents or cargo, as specified in transport and customs documentation. Used to determine net and gross weight in shipping, warehousing, and compliance.
terms.usage: The tare weight must be deducted from the gross weight to determine the net cargo weight on the bill of lading.

termTranslations.th: น้ำหนักภาชนะเปล่า

usageTranslations.en: The tare weight must be deducted from the gross weight to determine the net cargo weight on the bill of lading.
usageTranslations.tr: Taşıma senedinde net kargo ağırlığını belirlemek için brüt ağırlıktan dara ağırlığı çıkarılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le poids à vide doit être déduit du poids brut pour déterminer le poids net sur le connaissement.
usageTranslations.de: Das Tara-Gewicht muss vom Bruttogewicht abgezogen werden, um das Nettogewicht im Konnossement zu bestimmen.
usageTranslations.es: El peso tara debe restarse del peso bruto para determinar el peso neto en el conocimiento de embarque.
usageTranslations.zh: 提单上净货物重量需用总重减去皮重计算。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب خصم الوزن الفارغ من الوزن الإجمالي لتحديد الوزن الصافي في بوليصة الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: O peso tara deve ser subtraído do peso bruto para determinar o peso líquido no conhecimento de embarque.
usageTranslations.ru: Масса тары вычитается из массы брутто для определения массы нетто в коносаменте.
usageTranslations.ja: 船荷証券で正味貨物重量を求めるには空重量を総重量から差し引く必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Il peso tara deve essere sottratto dal peso lordo per determinare il peso netto sulla polizza di carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Trọng lượng bì phải được trừ khỏi trọng lượng tổng để xác định trọng lượng tịnh trên vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: बिल ऑफ लैडिंग पर शुद्ध माल का वजन निर्धारित करने के लिए टैरे वज़न को सकल वज़न से घटाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: น้ำหนักภาชนะเปล่าต้องหักออกจากน้ำหนักรวมเพื่อหาน้ำหนักสุทธิในใบตราส่งสินค้า
usageTranslations.id: Berat tara harus dikurangkan dari berat kotor untuk menentukan berat bersih pada bill of lading.

terms.definition: The agreed window of dates between shipowner and charterer during which a vessel must arrive at the loading port and be ready to load. If the vessel arrives before or after this period, contractual penalties or cancellation rights may apply.
terms.usage: The ship arrived at the loading port within the laycan period specified in the charter party agreement.

termTranslations.th: ช่วงเวลาเลย์แคน

usageTranslations.en: The ship arrived at the loading port within the laycan period specified in the charter party agreement.
usageTranslations.tr: Gemi, charter sözleşmesinde belirtilen laycan döneminde yükleme limanına vardı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le navire est arrivé au port de chargement pendant la période de laycan spécifiée dans la charte-partie.
usageTranslations.de: Das Schiff traf im Ladehafen innerhalb der im Chartervertrag festgelegten Laycan-Periode ein.
usageTranslations.es: El buque llegó al puerto de carga dentro del período laycan especificado en el contrato de fletamento.
usageTranslations.zh: 船舶在租船合同规定的装卸期内到达装货港。
usageTranslations.ar: وصلت السفينة إلى ميناء التحميل ضمن فترة لايكان المحددة في اتفاقية التأجير.
usageTranslations.pt: O navio chegou ao porto de carregamento dentro do período laycan especificado no contrato de afretamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно прибыло в порт погрузки в течение периода лейкан, указанного в чартер-партии.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶はチャーターパーティー契約で指定されたレイカン期間内に積込港に到着した。
usageTranslations.it: La nave è arrivata al porto di carico entro il periodo laycan specificato nel contratto di noleggio.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu đã đến cảng xếp hàng trong thời hạn laycan được quy định trong hợp đồng thuê tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज चार्टर पार्टी अनुबंध में निर्दिष्ट लेकेन अवधि के भीतर लोडिंग पोर्ट पर पहुंचा।
usageTranslations.th: เรือเดินสมุทรมาถึงท่าเรือขนถ่ายในช่วงเวลาเลย์แคนที่ระบุในสัญญาเช่าเหมาลำ
usageTranslations.id: Kapal tiba di pelabuhan muat dalam periode laycan yang ditentukan dalam perjanjian charter party.

terms.definition: A method of determining the weight of bulk cargo loaded or discharged from a vessel by measuring changes in the vessel’s draught before and after loading, in accordance with maritime standards.
terms.usage: A draught survey was conducted to verify the total weight of iron ore loaded onto the vessel.

termTranslations.th: การสำรวจระยะกินน้ำ

usageTranslations.en: A draught survey was conducted to verify the total weight of iron ore loaded onto the vessel.
usageTranslations.tr: Gemiye yüklenen demir cevherinin toplam ağırlığını doğrulamak için draft ölçümü yapıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un relevé de tirant d'eau a été effectué pour vérifier le poids total de minerai de fer chargé sur le navire.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Tiefgangmessung wurde durchgeführt, um das Gesamtgewicht des verladenen Eisenerzes zu überprüfen.
usageTranslations.es: Se realizó una encuesta de calado para verificar el peso total de mineral de hierro cargado en el buque.
usageTranslations.zh: 进行吃水测量以核实装载到船上的铁矿石总重量。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إجراء مسح الغاطس للتحقق من الوزن الإجمالي لخام الحديد المحمل على السفينة.
usageTranslations.pt: Foi realizado um levantamento de calado para verificar o peso total do minério de ferro carregado no navio.
usageTranslations.ru: Замер осадки проведён для подтверждения общего веса железной руды, погружённой на судно.
usageTranslations.ja: 積載された鉄鉱石の総重量を確認するために喫水サーベイが実施された。
usageTranslations.it: È stato effettuato un rilievo di pescaggio per verificare il peso totale del minerale di ferro caricato sulla nave.
usageTranslations.vi: Khảo sát mớn nước được tiến hành để xác minh tổng trọng lượng quặng sắt bốc lên tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज पर लोड किए गए लौह अयस्क के कुल वजन की पुष्टि के लिए ड्राफ्ट सर्वेक्षण किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: ได้มีการสำรวจระยะกินน้ำเพื่อยืนยันน้ำหนักรวมของสินแร่เหล็กที่บรรทุกขึ้นเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Survei sarat dilakukan untuk memverifikasi total berat bijih besi yang dimuat ke kapal.

terms.definition: The transportation of goods between an inland location and a port or terminal by road, rail, or barge, as part of a multimodal logistics chain before or after the main ocean or air leg.
terms.usage: The freight forwarder arranged inland haulage from the factory to the port of loading as part of the door-to-port service.

termTranslations.th: การขนส่งภายในประเทศ

usageTranslations.en: The freight forwarder arranged inland haulage from the factory to the port of loading as part of the door-to-port service.
usageTranslations.tr: Nakliyeci, kapıdan limana hizmet kapsamında fabrikadan limana iç taşıma organize etti.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transitaire a organisé le transport intérieur de l'usine au port de chargement dans le cadre du service porte-à-port.
usageTranslations.de: Der Spediteur organisierte den Inland-Transport von der Fabrik zum Verladehafen als Teil des Door-to-Port-Services.
usageTranslations.es: El transitario organizó el transporte interior desde la fábrica hasta el puerto de carga como parte del servicio puerta a puerto.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运代理安排了从工厂到装货港的内陆运输，作为门到港服务的一部分。
usageTranslations.ar: نظم وكيل الشحن النقل الداخلي من المصنع إلى ميناء التحميل كجزء من خدمة الباب إلى الميناء.
usageTranslations.pt: O transitário organizou o transporte interno da fábrica ao porto de embarque como parte do serviço porta-a-porto.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспедитор организовал внутренние перевозки с завода до порта погрузки в рамках услуги door-to-port.
usageTranslations.ja: フォワーダーはドア・トゥ・ポートサービスの一環として工場から積出港までの内陸輸送を手配した。
usageTranslations.it: Lo spedizioniere ha organizzato il trasporto interno dalla fabbrica al porto di carico come parte del servizio door-to-port.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà giao nhận đã sắp xếp vận tải nội địa từ nhà máy đến cảng xếp hàng trong gói dịch vụ từ cửa đến cảng.
usageTranslations.hi: फ्रेट फॉरवर्डर ने फैक्ट्री से लोडिंग पोर्ट तक डोर-टू-पोर्ट सेवा के हिस्से के रूप में इनलैंड परिवहन की व्यवस्था की।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดส่งได้จัดการขนส่งภายในประเทศจากโรงงานไปยังท่าเรือขนถ่ายสินค้าในบริการ door-to-port
usageTranslations.id: Forwarder mengatur angkutan darat dari pabrik ke pelabuhan muat sebagai bagian dari layanan door-to-port.

terms.definition: A secured facility authorized by customs authorities where imported goods can be stored, manipulated, or undergo manufacturing operations without payment of duties and taxes until they are released for local consumption or re-export.
terms.usage: Goods were stored in a bonded warehouse pending customs clearance and payment of applicable import duties.

termTranslations.th: คลังสินค้าทัณฑ์บน

usageTranslations.en: Goods were stored in a bonded warehouse pending customs clearance and payment of applicable import duties.
usageTranslations.tr: Eşyalar, gümrük işlemleri ve ilgili ithalat vergilerinin ödenmesi beklenirken antrepoda depolandı.
usageTranslations.fr: Les marchandises ont été stockées dans un entrepôt sous douane en attendant le dédouanement et le paiement des droits d'importation applicables.
usageTranslations.de: Waren wurden in einem Zolllager gelagert, bis die Zollabfertigung und die Zahlung der anfallenden Einfuhrabgaben erfolgt sind.
usageTranslations.es: Las mercancías se almacenaron en un depósito aduanero hasta el despacho de aduana y el pago de los derechos de importación.
usageTranslations.zh: 货物在保税仓库中存放，等待清关及缴纳相应进口关税。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تخزين البضائع في مستودع جمركي ريثما يتم التخليص الجمركي ودفع الرسوم الجمركية المستحقة.
usageTranslations.pt: As mercadorias foram armazenadas em um armazém alfandegado aguardando liberação alfandegária e pagamento dos direitos de importação.
usageTranslations.ru: Товары хранились на таможенном складе в ожидании таможенной очистки и уплаты соответствующих импортных пошлин.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物は通関手続きと該当する輸入関税の支払い待ちの間、保税倉庫に保管された。
usageTranslations.it: Le merci sono state depositate in un magazzino doganale in attesa dello sdoganamento e del pagamento dei dazi d'importazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Hàng hóa được lưu giữ tại kho ngoại quan chờ thông quan và nộp thuế nhập khẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: सामान को कस्टम क्लीयरेंस और लागू आयात शुल्क के भुगतान की प्रतीक्षा में बॉन्डेड वेयरहाउस में रखा गया था।
usageTranslations.th: สินค้าเก็บไว้ในคลังสินค้าทัณฑ์บนระหว่างรอพิธีการศุลกากรและการชำระภาษีนำเข้า
usageTranslations.id: Barang disimpan di gudang berikat sambil menunggu proses bea cukai dan pembayaran bea masuk.

terms.definition: A legal document issued by a warehouse operator confirming receipt and storage of specified goods. Serves as evidence of title, storage, and may be negotiable for trade finance or collateral.
terms.usage: The bank required a warehouse receipt as collateral for the trade finance facility.

termTranslations.th: ใบรับคลังสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: The bank required a warehouse receipt as collateral for the trade finance facility.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka, ticaret finansmanı için teminat olarak depo makbuzu talep etti.
usageTranslations.fr: La banque a exigé un récépissé d’entrepôt comme garantie pour le financement commercial.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bank verlangte einen Lagerempfangsschein als Sicherheit für die Handelsfinanzierung.
usageTranslations.es: El banco exigió un recibo de almacén como garantía para la financiación comercial.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行要求以仓库收据作为贸易融资的抵押。
usageTranslations.ar: اشترط البنك إيصال مستودع كضمان لمنشأة التمويل التجاري.
usageTranslations.pt: O banco exigiu um recibo de armazém como garantia para o financiamento comercial.
usageTranslations.ru: Банк потребовал складскую расписку в качестве залога по торговому финансированию.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は貿易金融の担保として倉庫証券を要求した。
usageTranslations.it: La banca ha richiesto una ricevuta di magazzino come garanzia per il finanziamento commerciale.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng yêu cầu phiếu nhập kho làm tài sản thế chấp cho khoản vay thương mại.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक ने व्यापार वित्त सुविधा के लिए वेयरहाउस रसीद को संपार्श्विक के रूप में मांगा।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารขอใบรับคลังสินค้าเป็นหลักประกันสำหรับสินเชื่อการค้า
usageTranslations.id: Bank meminta kwitansi gudang sebagai jaminan fasilitas pembiayaan perdagangan.

terms.definition: A detailed document prepared by the exporter or shipper, listing each item, quantity, and packaging details in a shipment. Essential for customs clearance, insurance, and logistics planning.
terms.usage: The customs authorities requested a packing list to verify the contents of the imported shipment.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีรายการบรรจุภัณฑ์

usageTranslations.en: The customs authorities requested a packing list to verify the contents of the imported shipment.
usageTranslations.tr: Gümrük yetkilileri, ithal edilen gönderinin içeriğini doğrulamak için paketleme listesi talep etti.
usageTranslations.fr: Les autorités douanières ont demandé une liste de colisage pour vérifier le contenu de l’envoi importé.
usageTranslations.de: Die Zollbehörden forderten eine Packliste an, um den Inhalt der Importlieferung zu überprüfen.
usageTranslations.es: Las autoridades aduaneras solicitaron una lista de empaque para verificar el contenido del envío importado.
usageTranslations.zh: 海关要求提供装箱单以核查进口货物内容。
usageTranslations.ar: طلبت السلطات الجمركية قائمة التعبئة للتحقق من محتويات الشحنة المستوردة.
usageTranslations.pt: As autoridades aduaneiras solicitaram uma lista de embalagem para verificar o conteúdo da remessa importada.
usageTranslations.ru: Таможенные органы запросили упаковочный лист для проверки содержимого импортируемого груза.
usageTranslations.ja: 税関当局は輸入貨物の内容物を確認するために梱包明細書を要求した。
usageTranslations.it: Le autorità doganali hanno richiesto una distinta di imballaggio per verificare il contenuto della spedizione importata.
usageTranslations.vi: Cơ quan hải quan yêu cầu phiếu đóng gói để xác minh nội dung lô hàng nhập khẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: सीमा शुल्क अधिकारियों ने आयातित खेप की सामग्री की पुष्टि के लिए पैकिंग सूची मांगी।
usageTranslations.th: เจ้าหน้าที่ศุลกากรขอบัญชีรายการบรรจุภัณฑ์เพื่อตรวจสอบเนื้อหาของการนำเข้า
usageTranslations.id: Otoritas bea cukai meminta daftar kemasan untuk memverifikasi isi kiriman impor.

terms.definition: An official document issued by a surveyor or authority certifying that cargo has been properly stuffed, secured, and inspected inside a container prior to shipment.
terms.usage: A vanning certificate was issued to confirm the safe loading and securing of goods inside the container.

termTranslations.th: หนังสือรับรองการบรรจุสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: A vanning certificate was issued to confirm the safe loading and securing of goods inside the container.
usageTranslations.tr: Konteyner içine malların güvenli şekilde yüklenip sabitlendiğini onaylamak için vanning sertifikası düzenlendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Un certificat de vannage a été délivré pour attester du chargement et du calage sécurisés des marchandises dans le conteneur.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Vanning-Zertifikat wurde ausgestellt, um die sichere Beladung und Sicherung der Waren im Container zu bestätigen.
usageTranslations.es: Se emitió un certificado de vanning para confirmar la carga y sujeción segura de las mercancías en el contenedor.
usageTranslations.zh: 签发了装箱证明书以确认货物在集装箱内已安全装载和固定。
usageTranslations.ar: تم إصدار شهادة الترصيص لتأكيد تحميل وتثبيت البضائع بأمان داخل الحاوية.
usageTranslations.pt: Foi emitido um certificado de vanning para confirmar o carregamento e a fixação segura das mercadorias dentro do contêiner.
usageTranslations.ru: Сертификат ваннинга был выдан для подтверждения безопасной загрузки и крепления товаров в контейнере.
usageTranslations.ja: コンテナ内への安全な積載と固定を確認するためバンニング証明書が発行された。
usageTranslations.it: È stato rilasciato un certificato di vanning per confermare il carico e il fissaggio sicuro delle merci nel container.
usageTranslations.vi: Chứng nhận xếp hàng được cấp để xác nhận việc xếp và cố định hàng hóa an toàn trong container.
usageTranslations.hi: कंटेनर के भीतर माल के सुरक्षित लोडिंग और फिक्सिंग की पुष्टि के लिए वैन्निंग प्रमाणपत्र जारी किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: ออกหนังสือรับรองการบรรจุสินค้าเพื่อยืนยันการขนถ่ายและตรึงสินค้าในตู้คอนเทนเนอร์อย่างปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Sertifikat vanning dikeluarkan untuk mengonfirmasi pemuatan dan pengikatan barang secara aman di dalam kontainer.

terms.definition: The technical assessment of the type, quantity, and placement of securing materials (lashings) needed to stabilize cargo inside a container or on a vessel, ensuring compliance with safety standards.
terms.usage: The lashing calculation ensured that all heavy machinery was secured according to IMO regulations for sea transport.

termTranslations.th: การคำนวณการรัดตรึง

usageTranslations.en: The lashing calculation ensured that all heavy machinery was secured according to IMO regulations for sea transport.
usageTranslations.tr: Lashing hesaplaması, tüm ağır makinelerin IMO deniz taşımacılığı yönetmeliklerine uygun şekilde sabitlenmesini sağladı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le calcul d’arrimage a permis de s’assurer que toutes les machines lourdes étaient sécurisées conformément aux réglementations de l’OMI pour le transport maritime.
usageTranslations.de: Die Lashingsberechnung stellte sicher, dass alle schweren Maschinen gemäß IMO-Vorschriften für den Seetransport gesichert waren.
usageTranslations.es: El cálculo de amarre garantizó que toda la maquinaria pesada estuviera asegurada según las normativas de la OMI para el transporte marítimo.
usageTranslations.zh: 绑扎计算确保所有重型机械均根据IMO海运规定加固。
usageTranslations.ar: ضمنت حسابات التربيط تثبيت جميع المعدات الثقيلة وفقًا للوائح المنظمة البحرية الدولية للنقل البحري.
usageTranslations.pt: O cálculo de amarração garantiu que todas as máquinas pesadas fossem fixadas de acordo com os regulamentos da IMO para transporte marítimo.
usageTranslations.ru: Расчёт креплений обеспечил фиксацию всей тяжёлой техники в соответствии с требованиями ИМО для морских перевозок.
usageTranslations.ja: ラッシング計算により、すべての重量機械がIMO海上輸送規則に従って固定されていることが確認された。
usageTranslations.it: Il calcolo del fissaggio ha garantito che tutti i macchinari pesanti fossero fissati secondo i regolamenti IMO per il trasporto marittimo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tính toán dây buộc đảm bảo tất cả máy móc nặng được cố định theo quy định IMO cho vận chuyển đường biển.
usageTranslations.hi: लैशिंग गणना ने यह सुनिश्चित किया कि सभी भारी मशीनरी IMO समुद्री परिवहन विनियमों के अनुसार सुरक्षित की गई थी।
usageTranslations.th: การคำนวณการรัดตรึงทำให้มั่นใจว่าเครื่องจักรหนักทั้งหมดถูกยึดตามข้อบังคับ IMO สำหรับการขนส่งทางทะเล
usageTranslations.id: Perhitungan lashing memastikan semua mesin berat diamankan sesuai regulasi IMO untuk transportasi laut.

terms.definition: Materials used to protect, brace, and separate cargo during transportation, such as wood, inflatable bags, or foam, preventing movement, moisture, and damage.
terms.usage: Dunnage material was placed around the fragile goods to prevent damage during transit.

termTranslations.th: วัสดุรองรับสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: Dunnage material was placed around the fragile goods to prevent damage during transit.
usageTranslations.tr: Kırılabilir eşyaların etrafına taşıma sırasında zarar görmemesi için dunnage malzemesi yerleştirildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Du matériel de calage a été placé autour des marchandises fragiles pour éviter tout dommage pendant le transport.
usageTranslations.de: Stauholz wurde um die zerbrechlichen Güter gelegt, um Schäden beim Transport zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Se colocó material de estiba alrededor de los artículos frágiles para evitar daños durante el tránsito.
usageTranslations.zh: 在易碎货物周围放置垫舱材料以防运输过程中损坏。
usageTranslations.ar: تم وضع مواد الدعامات حول البضائع الهشة لمنع تلفها أثناء النقل.
usageTranslations.pt: Material de estiva foi colocado ao redor dos itens frágeis para evitar danos durante o trânsito.
usageTranslations.ru: Вокруг хрупких товаров был размещён dunnage материал для предотвращения повреждений во время перевозки.
usageTranslations.ja: 輸送中の損傷を防ぐため壊れやすい貨物の周囲にダネージ材が配置された。
usageTranslations.it: Materiale di dunnage è stato posto intorno alle merci fragili per evitarne il danneggiamento durante il trasporto.
usageTranslations.vi: Vật liệu chèn lót được đặt xung quanh hàng dễ vỡ để tránh hư hỏng khi vận chuyển.
usageTranslations.hi: परिवहन के दौरान नुकसान से बचाने के लिए नाजुक वस्तुओं के चारों ओर डनेज सामग्री रखी गई।
usageTranslations.th: มีการวางวัสดุรองรับสินค้ารอบสินค้าที่เปราะบางเพื่อป้องกันความเสียหายระหว่างขนส่ง
usageTranslations.id: Bahan dunnage ditempatkan di sekitar barang rapuh untuk mencegah kerusakan selama transit.

terms.definition: An official document confirming the loading of cargo into a shipping container, including details of cargo, seal, time, and loading supervision.
terms.usage: The forwarder issued a stuffing report after supervising the entire loading process and sealing the container.

termTranslations.th: รายงานการบรรทุก

usageTranslations.en: The forwarder issued a stuffing report after supervising the entire loading process and sealing the container.
usageTranslations.tr: Nakliyeci, tüm yükleme sürecini denetledikten ve konteyneri mühürledikten sonra yükleme tutanağı düzenledi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transitaire a établi un rapport de chargement après avoir supervisé le processus et scellé le conteneur.
usageTranslations.de: Der Spediteur stellte nach der Überwachung des gesamten Beladungsvorgangs und der Versiegelung des Containers einen Beladungsbericht aus.
usageTranslations.es: El transitario emitió un informe de estiba tras supervisar y sellar el contenedor.
usageTranslations.zh: 货代在监督整个装箱过程并封箱后出具了装箱报告。
usageTranslations.ar: أصدر الناقل تقرير التحميل بعد الإشراف على التحميل وختم الحاوية.
usageTranslations.pt: O despachante emitiu o relatório de estufagem após supervisionar e lacrar o contêiner.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспедитор выдал акт загрузки после контроля загрузки и опломбирования контейнера.
usageTranslations.ja: フォワーダーは積込作業を監督し、コンテナを封印後、積込報告書を発行しました。
usageTranslations.it: Lo spedizioniere ha redatto il rapporto di caricamento dopo aver supervisionato e sigillato il container.
usageTranslations.vi: Người giao nhận lập biên bản xếp hàng sau khi giám sát và niêm phong container.
usageTranslations.hi: फॉरवार्डर ने संपूर्ण लोडिंग प्रक्रिया की निगरानी के बाद लोडिंग रिपोर्ट जारी की।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ขนส่งออกเอกสารรายงานการบรรทุกหลังจากดูแลและปิดผนึกตู้คอนเทนเนอร์
usageTranslations.id: Ekspedisi mengeluarkan laporan stuffing setelah mengawasi dan menyegel kontainer.

terms.definition: A document verifying the unloading of goods from a container, indicating the cargo status, seal check, and any discrepancies or damages.
terms.usage: A stripping report is prepared to document cargo conditions when a container is unpacked at the destination warehouse.

termTranslations.th: รายงานการขนถ่าย

usageTranslations.en: A stripping report is prepared to document cargo conditions when a container is unpacked at the destination warehouse.
usageTranslations.tr: Varış deposunda konteyner boşaltıldığında yükün durumunu belgelemek için boşaltma tutanağı hazırlanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un rapport de déchargement est rédigé lors du dépotage au dépôt de destination.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Entladungsbericht wird beim Entladen im Bestimmungslager erstellt.
usageTranslations.es: Se prepara un informe de desestiba al vaciar el contenedor en el almacén de destino.
usageTranslations.zh: 目的地仓库拆箱时需出具拆箱报告以记录货物状态。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم إعداد تقرير التفريغ عند تفريغ الحاوية في مستودع الوجهة.
usageTranslations.pt: O relatório de desova é elaborado ao desovar o contêiner no depósito de destino.
usageTranslations.ru: Акт разгрузки составляется при вскрытии контейнера на складе назначения.
usageTranslations.ja: 到着倉庫でコンテナを開梱する際、取卸報告書が作成されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il rapporto di scarico viene compilato allo scarico del container nel magazzino di destinazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Biên bản rút hàng lập khi mở container tại kho đích.
usageTranslations.hi: गंतव्य वेयरहाउस में कंटेनर खोलते समय अनलोडिंग रिपोर्ट बनाई जाती है।
usageTranslations.th: จัดทำรายงานการขนถ่ายเมื่อเปิดตู้ที่คลังปลายทาง
usageTranslations.id: Laporan stripping dibuat saat membongkar kontainer di gudang tujuan.

terms.definition: A standard international commercial term, defined by the ICC, governing the allocation of risks, costs, and responsibilities between buyer and seller in trade.
terms.usage: The parties agreed on the DDP Incoterms rule, making the seller responsible for delivery and import clearance.

termTranslations.th: กฎ Incoterms

usageTranslations.en: The parties agreed on the DDP Incoterms rule, making the seller responsible for delivery and import clearance.
usageTranslations.tr: Taraflar, teslimat ve ithalat gümrük işlemlerinden satıcının sorumlu olduğu DDP Incoterms kuralında anlaştı.
usageTranslations.fr: Les parties ont convenu de la règle Incoterms DDP, rendant le vendeur responsable de la livraison et du dédouanement.
usageTranslations.de: Die Parteien einigten sich auf die DDP-Incoterms-Regel, wodurch der Verkäufer für die Lieferung und Verzollung verantwortlich ist.
usageTranslations.es: Las partes acordaron la regla Incoterms DDP, responsabilizando al vendedor de la entrega y el despacho.
usageTranslations.zh: 双方同意采用DDP国际贸易术语规则，由卖方负责交货及进口清关。
usageTranslations.ar: اتفق الطرفان على قاعدة DDP للإنكوترمز، مما يجعل البائع مسؤولاً عن التسليم والتخليص الجمركي.
usageTranslations.pt: As partes concordaram com a regra Incoterms DDP, tornando o vendedor responsável pela entrega e liberação.
usageTranslations.ru: Стороны согласовали правило Инкотермс DDP — продавец отвечает за доставку и таможню.
usageTranslations.ja: 両者はDDPインコタームズ規則に合意し、売主が納品と輸入通関を担うことになりました。
usageTranslations.it: Le parti hanno concordato la regola Incoterms DDP, con il venditore responsabile di consegna e sdoganamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Các bên thống nhất quy tắc Incoterms DDP, bên bán chịu trách nhiệm giao hàng và thông quan.
usageTranslations.hi: पक्षों ने DDP इंकोटर्म्स नियम पर सहमति दी, जिससे विक्रेता डिलीवरी और क्लीयरेंस का जिम्मेदार है।
usageTranslations.th: ทั้งสองฝ่ายตกลงตามกฎ Incoterms DDP ผู้ขายรับผิดชอบการส่งมอบและพิธีการนำเข้า
usageTranslations.id: Para pihak sepakat pada aturan Incoterms DDP, penjual bertanggung jawab pengiriman dan bea masuk.

terms.definition: A financial incentive paid by the shipowner to the charterer if loading/unloading is completed faster than the time allowed (laytime) in the charter party.
terms.usage: The vessel finished discharging ahead of schedule, entitling the charterer to claim despatch money from the shipowner.

termTranslations.th: เงินรางวัลการขนถ่ายเร็ว

usageTranslations.en: The vessel finished discharging ahead of schedule, entitling the charterer to claim despatch money from the shipowner.
usageTranslations.tr: Gemi planlanandan önce tahliyeyi bitirdiği için kiracı despatch ücreti talep etti.
usageTranslations.fr: Le navire a déchargé avant l'heure prévue, donnant droit à la prime de dépêchage.
usageTranslations.de: Das Schiff beendete das Löschen vorzeitig, sodass der Charterer Liegegeldersparnis beanspruchen konnte.
usageTranslations.es: El buque terminó antes de lo previsto, permitiendo al fletador reclamar dinero de despacho.
usageTranslations.zh: 船舶提前卸货完成，租家有权向船东要求速遣费。
usageTranslations.ar: أنهت السفينة التفريغ مبكرًا مما يخول المستأجر للمطالبة بأموال التعجيل.
usageTranslations.pt: O navio descarregou antes do prazo, dando direito ao afretador de solicitar dinheiro de despacho.
usageTranslations.ru: Судно разгрузилось досрочно, и фрахтователь получил премию за досрочную обработку.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶が予定より早く荷降ろしを終え、傭船者はディスパッチマネーを請求できた。
usageTranslations.it: La nave ha scaricato prima del previsto, consentendo al noleggiatore di richiedere il premio di despacho.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu dỡ hàng sớm nên chủ thuê được nhận tiền thưởng dỡ hàng sớm.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज ने समय से पहले उताराई पूरी की, जिससे किरायेदार को डिस्पैच मनी मिली।
usageTranslations.th: เรือขนถ่ายเสร็จก่อนกำหนด ผู้เช่าสามารถเรียกรับเงินรางวัลได้
usageTranslations.id: Kapal selesai bongkar lebih awal, sehingga penyewa berhak atas uang despatch.

terms.definition: The unused space in a ship's hold or container that results from the irregular shape of cargo or inefficient packing.
terms.usage: Broken stowage reduces cargo capacity and increases shipping costs due to inefficient space utilization.

termTranslations.ja: ブロークンストウェージ
termTranslations.th: พื้นที่ว่างเปล่าในห้องเก็บสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: Broken stowage reduces cargo capacity and increases shipping costs due to inefficient space utilization.
usageTranslations.tr: Boş hacim, verimsiz alan kullanımı nedeniyle taşıma kapasitesini azaltır ve maliyetleri artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le calage perdu réduit la capacité de chargement et augmente les coûts d’expédition.
usageTranslations.de: Laderaumverlust verringert die Ladekapazität und erhöht die Transportkosten.
usageTranslations.es: El espacio perdido reduce la capacidad y aumenta los costes de envío.
usageTranslations.zh: 破舱空间导致装载量下降并提高运输成本。
usageTranslations.ar: فراغ التحميل يقلل من سعة الشحن ويزيد التكاليف.
usageTranslations.pt: A estiva quebrada reduz a capacidade e aumenta os custos de transporte.
usageTranslations.ru: Потерянное место уменьшает вместимость и увеличивает стоимость перевозки.
usageTranslations.ja: ブロークンストウェージは積載容量を減らしコストを上げます。
usageTranslations.it: Lo spazio inutilizzato riduce la capacità di carico e aumenta i costi.
usageTranslations.vi: Khoảng trống xếp hàng làm giảm dung tích và tăng chi phí vận chuyển.
usageTranslations.hi: टूटी स्टोवेज क्षमता कम और लागत अधिक करती है।
usageTranslations.th: พื้นที่ว่างเปล่าทำให้ขนส่งได้น้อยลงและต้นทุนสูงขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Ruang kosong mengurangi kapasitas dan meningkatkan biaya pengiriman.

terms.definition: The weight used by carriers to calculate freight charges, usually the greater of actual or volumetric (dimensional) weight, per tariff rules.
terms.usage: The billable weight for air cargo is calculated by comparing actual and volumetric weights as per IATA rules.

termTranslations.th: น้ำหนักที่ใช้คิดเงิน

usageTranslations.en: The billable weight for air cargo is calculated by comparing actual and volumetric weights as per IATA rules.
usageTranslations.tr: Hava kargoda faturalandırılabilir ağırlık, IATA kurallarına göre gerçek ve hacimsel ağırlık karşılaştırılarak hesaplanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le poids facturable pour le fret aérien est calculé selon les règles IATA.
usageTranslations.de: Das Verrechnungsgewicht für Luftfracht wird nach IATA-Regeln berechnet.
usageTranslations.es: El peso facturable se calcula comparando el peso real y volumétrico según las normas IATA.
usageTranslations.zh: 空运计费重量根据IATA规则比较实际重量与体积重量。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم حساب الوزن القابل للفوترة للشحن الجوي وفق قواعد IATA.
usageTranslations.pt: O peso faturável para carga aérea é calculado conforme as regras da IATA.
usageTranslations.ru: Расчетный вес для авиагрузов определяется по правилам ИАТА.
usageTranslations.ja: 航空貨物の課金重量はIATA規則に基づき算出される。
usageTranslations.it: Il peso fatturabile per il cargo aereo è calcolato secondo le regole IATA.
usageTranslations.vi: Trọng lượng tính phí hàng không tính theo quy định của IATA.
usageTranslations.hi: हवाई कार्गो के लिए बिल योग्य वजन IATA नियमों के अनुसार गणना होता है।
usageTranslations.th: น้ำหนักที่ใช้คิดเงินคำนวณตามกฎ IATA
usageTranslations.id: Berat tertagih untuk kargo udara dihitung sesuai aturan IATA.

terms.definition: A logistics practice where shippers and consignees swap pallets at the point of delivery to avoid loss and maintain pallet pool balances.
terms.usage: A pallet exchange system ensures that standardized pallets are always available in the supply chain network.

termTranslations.th: การแลกเปลี่ยนพาเลท

usageTranslations.en: A pallet exchange system ensures that standardized pallets are always available in the supply chain network.
usageTranslations.tr: Palet takas sistemi, tedarik zincirinde standart paletlerin sürekli bulunmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le système d’échange de palettes garantit la disponibilité constante des palettes standard.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Palettentauschsystem sorgt für ständige Verfügbarkeit von Standardpaletten.
usageTranslations.es: El sistema de intercambio de palets garantiza la disponibilidad constante de palets estándar.
usageTranslations.zh: 托盘交换系统确保供应链中标准托盘持续可用。
usageTranslations.ar: يضمن نظام تبادل المنصات توفر المنصات القياسية في سلسلة الإمداد.
usageTranslations.pt: O sistema de troca de paletes garante a disponibilidade de paletes padronizados.
usageTranslations.ru: Система обмена паллетами обеспечивает постоянное наличие стандартных паллет.
usageTranslations.ja: パレット交換システムは標準パレットの常時確保を保証する。
usageTranslations.it: Il sistema di scambio di pallet assicura la disponibilità di pallet standard.
usageTranslations.vi: Hệ thống trao đổi pallet đảm bảo pallet tiêu chuẩn luôn sẵn sàng.
usageTranslations.hi: पैलेट एक्सचेंज सिस्टम आपूर्ति श्रृंखला में मानक पैलेट उपलब्ध रखता है।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบแลกเปลี่ยนพาเลททำให้มีพาเลทมาตรฐานในห่วงโซ่อุปทานตลอดเวลา
usageTranslations.id: Sistem tukar palet menjamin ketersediaan palet standar.

terms.definition: A freight service that combines multiple shipments from different shippers into a single container or truckload to optimize costs and logistics.
terms.usage: Consolidation services are widely used in LCL shipments to reduce unit shipping costs for small-volume exporters.

termTranslations.th: บริการรวบรวมสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: Consolidation services are widely used in LCL shipments to reduce unit shipping costs for small-volume exporters.
usageTranslations.tr: Konsolidasyon servisleri, küçük hacimli ihracatçılar için birim navlun maliyetlerini azaltmak amacıyla LCL taşımalarında yaygın olarak kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les services de groupage sont utilisés pour réduire les coûts pour les petits exportateurs.
usageTranslations.de: Sammelgutservices werden im LCL eingesetzt, um Kosten zu senken.
usageTranslations.es: El servicio de consolidación se usa en envíos LCL para reducir costes.
usageTranslations.zh: 拼箱服务广泛应用于LCL运输，帮助小批量出口商降低运输成本。
usageTranslations.ar: تُستخدم خدمة التجميع لتقليل التكاليف للمصدرين الصغار.
usageTranslations.pt: O serviço de consolidação reduz custos em embarques LCL.
usageTranslations.ru: Услуга консолидации применяется для снижения затрат на малых объемах.
usageTranslations.ja: 混載サービスは小口出荷のコスト削減に使われます。
usageTranslations.it: Il servizio di consolidamento riduce i costi per piccoli esportatori.
usageTranslations.vi: Dịch vụ gom hàng giảm chi phí cho nhà xuất nhỏ.
usageTranslations.hi: कंसोलिडेशन सेवा छोटे निर्यातकों की लागत कम करती है।
usageTranslations.th: บริการรวบรวมสินค้าลดต้นทุนให้ผู้ส่งออกขนาดเล็ก
usageTranslations.id: Layanan konsolidasi menurunkan biaya untuk eksportir kecil.

terms.definition: A transport route that crosses land (by truck or rail), used for freight moving between inland points or to avoid sea/air legs.
terms.usage: Freight to Central Asia often uses overland routes instead of maritime corridors for faster delivery.

termTranslations.th: เส้นทางทางบก

usageTranslations.en: Freight to Central Asia often uses overland routes instead of maritime corridors for faster delivery.
usageTranslations.tr: Orta Asya'ya yükler daha hızlı teslimat için genellikle deniz yerine kara rotalarını kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le fret vers l’Asie centrale privilégie souvent l’itinéraire terrestre.
usageTranslations.de: Frachten nach Zentralasien nutzen oft den Landweg statt Seetransport.
usageTranslations.es: Las cargas a Asia Central usan rutas terrestres para mayor rapidez.
usageTranslations.zh: 运往中亚的货物常通过陆路线路实现更快运输。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم الشحن إلى آسيا الوسطى غالبًا الطريق البري.
usageTranslations.pt: Cargas para a Ásia Central usam rotas terrestres para entrega rápida.
usageTranslations.ru: Грузы в Центральную Азию идут по сухопутным маршрутам для скорости.
usageTranslations.ja: 中央アジア向け貨物は陸路ルートを利用することが多い。
usageTranslations.it: Il traffico verso l’Asia centrale usa spesso la rotta terrestre.
usageTranslations.vi: Hàng đến Trung Á thường dùng tuyến đường bộ để giao nhanh.
usageTranslations.hi: मध्य एशिया के लिए माल आमतौर पर भूमि मार्ग से भेजा जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: สินค้าส่งไปเอเชียกลางนิยมใช้เส้นทางทางบกเพื่อความรวดเร็ว
usageTranslations.id: Kargo ke Asia Tengah sering menggunakan rute darat untuk pengiriman cepat.

terms.definition: A transport operation involving at least two different modes of carriage (e.g., sea, road, rail, air) under a single contract and responsibility.
terms.usage: Multimodal transport combines sea, rail, and trucking under a single bill of lading, simplifying logistics.

termTranslations.th: การขนส่งหลายรูปแบบ

usageTranslations.en: Multimodal transport combines sea, rail, and trucking under a single bill of lading, simplifying logistics.
usageTranslations.tr: Çoklu taşıma, deniz, demir yolu ve karayolunu tek konşimento ile birleştirerek lojistiği kolaylaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transport multimodal regroupe mer, rail et route sous un seul connaissement.
usageTranslations.de: Multimodaler Verkehr vereint See-, Bahn- und Straßentransport unter einem Frachtbrief.
usageTranslations.es: El transporte multimodal combina mar, tren y camión en un solo conocimiento de embarque.
usageTranslations.zh: 多式联运将海运、铁路和公路运输整合到一份提单下。
usageTranslations.ar: النقل المتعدد يجمع البحر والسكك والشاحنات بوثيقة موحدة.
usageTranslations.pt: O transporte multimodal reúne mar, ferrovia e rodovia sob um conhecimento único.
usageTranslations.ru: Мультимодальные перевозки объединяют море, железную дорогу и автотранспорт под одной накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: 複合一貫輸送は海・鉄道・陸送を一枚のB/Lで統合する。
usageTranslations.it: Il trasporto multimodale unisce mare, ferrovia e camion con un'unica polizza.
usageTranslations.vi: Vận tải đa phương thức gộp đường biển, sắt, bộ vào một vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: मल्टीमोडल परिवहन एक ही बीएल के तहत समुद्र, रेल और ट्रक को जोड़ता है।
usageTranslations.th: การขนส่งหลายรูปแบบรวบรวมทางเรือ รถไฟ และรถบรรทุกด้วยใบตราส่งเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Transportasi multimoda menggabungkan laut, rel, dan truk dalam satu dokumen.

terms.definition: An official document recording the quantity and condition of goods discharged from a vessel or container at the port of arrival, used for claims, insurance, and operational performance tracking.
terms.usage: The outturn report revealed a shortage and some damage in the discharged cargo at the destination port.

termTranslations.th: รายงานผลการขนถ่าย

usageTranslations.en: The outturn report revealed a shortage and some damage in the discharged cargo at the destination port.
usageTranslations.tr: Outturn raporu, varış limanında boşaltılan yükte eksiklik ve bazı hasarlar olduğunu gösterdi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le rapport d’outturn a révélé une pénurie et des dommages dans la cargaison déchargée au port de destination.
usageTranslations.de: Der Outturn-Bericht zeigte einen Mangel und einige Schäden an der entladenen Ladung im Zielhafen.
usageTranslations.es: El informe de outturn reveló escasez y algunos daños en la carga descargada en el puerto de destino.
usageTranslations.zh: 卸货报告显示到港卸货存在短缺和部分损坏。
usageTranslations.ar: كشف تقرير أوتيرن عن نقص وبعض الأضرار في البضائع المفرغة في ميناء الوصول.
usageTranslations.pt: O relatório de outturn revelou escassez e alguns danos na carga descarregada no porto de destino.
usageTranslations.ru: Отчет о выгрузке выявил недостачу и некоторые повреждения выгруженного груза в порту назначения.
usageTranslations.ja: アウトターン報告書で仕向港での荷下ろし貨物に不足と損傷が判明した。
usageTranslations.it: Il rapporto outturn ha evidenziato una carenza e alcuni danni nella merce scaricata al porto di destinazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo cáo outturn cho thấy thiếu hụt và một số hư hại trong lô hàng dỡ tại cảng đích.
usageTranslations.hi: आउटर्न रिपोर्ट ने गंतव्य बंदरगाह पर उतारे गए माल में कमी और कुछ क्षति का खुलासा किया।
usageTranslations.th: รายงานผลการขนถ่ายพบว่าสินค้าที่ขนถ่ายที่ท่าเรือปลายทางมีบางส่วนขาดหายและเสียหาย
usageTranslations.id: Laporan outturn menunjukkan kekurangan dan kerusakan pada kargo yang dibongkar di pelabuhan tujuan.

terms.definition: The possibility that cargo is not discharged at its intended port and is instead transported beyond its destination, leading to additional costs, delays, or claims.
terms.usage: Failure to mark the discharge port correctly may result in overcarriage risk and additional freight charges.

termTranslations.ja: オーバーキャリッジリスク
termTranslations.vi: Rủi ro vận chuyển vượt quá
termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงการขนส่งเกินปลายทาง

usageTranslations.en: Failure to mark the discharge port correctly may result in overcarriage risk and additional freight charges.
usageTranslations.tr: Boşaltma limanının doğru işaretlenmemesi fazla taşıma riski ve ek navlun ücretlerine yol açabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le non-marquage correct du port de déchargement peut entraîner un risque de surtransport et des frais de fret supplémentaires.
usageTranslations.de: Eine fehlerhafte Kennzeichnung des Löschhafens kann zu Überbeförderungsrisiko und zusätzlichen Frachtkosten führen.
usageTranslations.es: No marcar correctamente el puerto de descarga puede dar lugar a riesgo de sobretransporte y cargos adicionales.
usageTranslations.zh: 未正确标注卸货港可能导致超运风险及额外运费。
usageTranslations.ar: عدم تحديد ميناء التفريغ بشكل صحيح قد يؤدي إلى مخاطر النقل الزائد ورسوم شحن إضافية.
usageTranslations.pt: A falta de marcação correta do porto de descarga pode resultar em risco de overcarriage e custos de frete adicionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Неправильная маркировка порта выгрузки может привести к риску сверхдоставки и дополнительным фрахтовым сборам.
usageTranslations.ja: 荷下ろし港の記載ミスはオーバーキャリッジリスクや追加運賃の原因となる場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: L'errata indicazione del porto di scarico può comportare il rischio di overcarriage e costi di trasporto aggiuntivi.
usageTranslations.vi: Không ghi rõ cảng dỡ hàng có thể gây ra rủi ro vận chuyển vượt quá và phụ phí.
usageTranslations.hi: डिस्चार्ज पोर्ट को सही से चिह्नित नहीं करने से ओवरकैरेज जोखिम और अतिरिक्त मालभाड़ा लग सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: หากไม่ได้ระบุท่าเรือขนถ่ายอย่างถูกต้องอาจทำให้เกิดความเสี่ยงการขนส่งเกินปลายทางและค่าขนส่งเพิ่มเติม
usageTranslations.id: Kegagalan menandai pelabuhan bongkar dengan benar dapat menyebabkan risiko overcarriage dan biaya tambahan.

terms.definition: A Latin term meaning 'according to value,' used for duties, taxes, or charges calculated as a percentage of the declared value of goods in customs, insurance, or freight contracts.
terms.usage: An ad valorem duty of 5% was applied to the invoice value of the imported goods.

termTranslations.th: แอดวาโลเร็ม

usageTranslations.en: An ad valorem duty of 5% was applied to the invoice value of the imported goods.
usageTranslations.tr: İthal edilen malların fatura değerine %5 ad valorem vergi uygulandı.
usageTranslations.fr: Un droit ad valorem de 5% a été appliqué à la valeur facturée des marchandises importées.
usageTranslations.de: Auf den Rechnungswert der importierten Waren wurde ein ad valorem Zoll von 5% erhoben.
usageTranslations.es: Se aplicó un arancel ad valorem del 5% al valor en factura de las mercancías importadas.
usageTranslations.zh: 对进口货物的发票金额按5%征收从价税。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تطبيق رسم أد فالوريم بنسبة 5٪ على قيمة فاتورة البضائع المستوردة.
usageTranslations.pt: Foi aplicada uma taxa ad valorem de 5% sobre o valor da fatura das mercadorias importadas.
usageTranslations.ru: На инвойсовую стоимость импортированных товаров был наложен ad valorem сбор 5%.
usageTranslations.ja: 輸入貨物のインボイス価格に5％のアドバロレム関税が適用された。
usageTranslations.it: Un dazio ad valorem del 5% è stato applicato al valore in fattura delle merci importate.
usageTranslations.vi: Áp dụng thuế ad valorem 5% trên giá trị hóa đơn của hàng nhập khẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: आयातित माल के चालान मूल्य पर 5% एड वलोरम शुल्क लगाया गया।
usageTranslations.th: มีการเรียกเก็บภาษี ad valorem ร้อยละ 5 จากมูลค่าใบแจ้งหนี้ของสินค้านำเข้า
usageTranslations.id: Bea ad valorem sebesar 5% diterapkan pada nilai faktur barang impor.

terms.definition: The computation of the total time allowed for loading and discharging a vessel as agreed in the charter party, with contractual consequences for exceeding or saving time (demurrage or dispatch).
terms.usage: Accurate laytime calculation is essential to avoid demurrage charges for delayed operations in bulk shipping.

termTranslations.th: การคำนวณเวลา laytime

usageTranslations.en: Accurate laytime calculation is essential to avoid demurrage charges for delayed operations in bulk shipping.
usageTranslations.tr: Dökme yük taşımacılığında gecikme ücretlerinden kaçınmak için doğru laytime hesaplaması şarttır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un calcul précis du laytime est essentiel pour éviter les frais de surestaries lors d'opérations retardées dans le transport de vrac.
usageTranslations.de: Eine genaue Liegezeitberechnung ist unerlässlich, um Verzugsgebühren im Massengutverkehr zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Un cálculo preciso del laytime es fundamental para evitar cargos por demoras en operaciones de granel.
usageTranslations.zh: 准确计算装卸期对于避免散货运输延误滞期费至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: يعد حساب وقت الإرساء بدقة أمرًا ضروريًا لتجنب رسوم التأخير في عمليات الشحن بالجملة.
usageTranslations.pt: O cálculo preciso do laytime é fundamental para evitar taxas de sobrestadia em operações de granéis.
usageTranslations.ru: Точный расчёт laytime необходим для предотвращения сборов за простой при перевозках навалочных грузов.
usageTranslations.ja: バルク輸送の遅延で滞船料を避けるには正確なレイタイム計算が不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Un calcolo accurato del laytime è essenziale per evitare costi di demurrage nelle operazioni di carico alla rinfusa.
usageTranslations.vi: Tính toán laytime chính xác rất quan trọng để tránh phí lưu tàu trong vận chuyển hàng rời.
usageTranslations.hi: बल्क शिपिंग में देरी के लिए डेमरेज शुल्क से बचने के लिए सटीक लेटाइम गणना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การคำนวณ laytime ที่ถูกต้องเป็นสิ่งจำเป็นเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงค่าปรับ demurrage ในการขนส่งสินค้าขนาดใหญ่
usageTranslations.id: Perhitungan laytime yang akurat penting untuk menghindari biaya demurrage pada operasi pengiriman curah.

terms.definition: A port charge levied for the use of wharf or quay facilities in the loading or unloading of cargo, commonly included in port tariffs and paid by shipowners, agents, or cargo owners.
terms.usage: The port authority charged a wharfage fee for each container loaded onto the vessel at the terminal.

termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมท่าเทียบเรือ

usageTranslations.en: The port authority charged a wharfage fee for each container loaded onto the vessel at the terminal.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman otoritesi, terminalde gemiye yüklenen her konteyner için rıhtım ücreti talep etti.
usageTranslations.fr: L’autorité portuaire a facturé des frais de quai pour chaque conteneur chargé sur le navire au terminal.
usageTranslations.de: Die Hafenbehörde erhob für jeden am Terminal verladenen Container eine Kaigebühr.
usageTranslations.es: La autoridad portuaria cobró una tarifa de muelle por cada contenedor cargado en el buque en la terminal.
usageTranslations.zh: 港口当局对在码头装载到船上的每个集装箱收取码头费。
usageTranslations.ar: فرضت سلطة الميناء رسوم رصيف على كل حاوية تم تحميلها على السفينة في المحطة.
usageTranslations.pt: A autoridade portuária cobrou uma taxa de cais por cada contêiner carregado no navio no terminal.
usageTranslations.ru: Портовые власти взимали причальный сбор за каждый контейнер, загруженный на судно в терминале.
usageTranslations.ja: 港湾当局はターミナルで船に積み込まれた各コンテナに対して埠頭使用料を課した。
usageTranslations.it: L’autorità portuale ha addebitato una tassa di banchina per ogni container caricato sulla nave al terminal.
usageTranslations.vi: Cơ quan cảng thu phí cầu cảng cho mỗi container xếp lên tàu tại bến.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्ट अथॉरिटी ने टर्मिनल पर जहाज पर लोड किए गए प्रत्येक कंटेनर के लिए घाट शुल्क लिया।
usageTranslations.th: การท่าเรือเรียกเก็บค่าธรรมเนียมท่าเทียบเรือสำหรับตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แต่ละตู้ที่ขนขึ้นเรือที่ท่าเทียบเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Otoritas pelabuhan mengenakan biaya wharfage untuk setiap kontainer yang dimuat ke kapal di terminal.

terms.definition: A logistics process where incoming goods are unloaded and directly reloaded onto outbound vehicles with minimal or no storage time in between.
terms.usage: The crossdocking operation reduced warehouse costs by transferring goods directly from inbound to outbound docks.

termTranslations.ja: クロスドッキング作業
termTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการ Crossdocking

usageTranslations.en: The crossdocking operation reduced warehouse costs by transferring goods directly from inbound to outbound docks.
usageTranslations.tr: Crossdock operasyonu, malları doğrudan girişten çıkışa aktararak depo maliyetlerini azalttı.
usageTranslations.fr: L’opération de cross-docking a réduit les coûts d’entrepôt en transférant directement les marchandises.
usageTranslations.de: Die Crossdocking-Vorgänge senkten die Lagerkosten durch direkten Umschlag.
usageTranslations.es: La operación de crossdocking redujo los costes de almacén al transferir mercancía directamente.
usageTranslations.zh: 交叉转运作业通过直接转移货物降低了仓储成本。
usageTranslations.ar: قللت عملية العبور المباشر تكاليف المخزون بنقل البضائع مباشرة.
usageTranslations.pt: A operação de crossdocking reduziu os custos de estoque ao transferir cargas diretamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Операция кросс-докинга снизила складские издержки путем прямой перегрузки.
usageTranslations.ja: クロスドッキング作業で倉庫コストを削減した。
usageTranslations.it: L’operazione di crossdocking ha ridotto i costi di magazzino con trasferimenti diretti.
usageTranslations.vi: Hoạt động crossdocking giúp giảm chi phí kho nhờ chuyển hàng trực tiếp.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रॉसडॉकिंग ऑपरेशन ने इनबाउंड से आउटबाउंड तक सीधे माल भेजकर लागत घटाई।
usageTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการ Crossdocking ช่วยลดต้นทุนคลังสินค้าโดยถ่ายโอนสินค้าโดยตรง
usageTranslations.id: Operasi crossdocking menurunkan biaya gudang dengan transfer langsung.

terms.definition: Transport of goods from a port, airport, or border to inland destinations, often covering the final leg of international trade.
terms.usage: Efficient hinterland delivery ensures timely cargo movement from seaports to inland manufacturing sites.

termTranslations.th: การจัดส่งพื้นที่หลังท่า

usageTranslations.en: Efficient hinterland delivery ensures timely cargo movement from seaports to inland manufacturing sites.
usageTranslations.tr: Verimli hinterland teslimatı, deniz limanlarından iç üretim alanlarına zamanında yük taşınmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La livraison efficace à l’hinterland garantit un transfert ponctuel des marchandises.
usageTranslations.de: Effiziente Hinterlandanlieferung sorgt für rechtzeitige Frachtbewegung.
usageTranslations.es: La entrega eficiente al hinterland asegura traslado puntual.
usageTranslations.zh: 高效的腹地配送保证了从海港到内陆工厂的准时运输。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن توصيل المناطق الداخلية الفعال نقل البضائع في الوقت المناسب.
usageTranslations.pt: A entrega eficiente ao hinterland garante movimentação pontual.
usageTranslations.ru: Эффективная доставка в хинтерланд обеспечивает своевременное движение грузов.
usageTranslations.ja: 効率的なヒンターランド配送が納期を保証する。
usageTranslations.it: La consegna efficiente nell’hinterland assicura spostamenti puntuali.
usageTranslations.vi: Giao hàng nội địa hiệu quả đảm bảo chuyển hàng đúng giờ.
usageTranslations.hi: कुशल हिंटरलैंड डिलीवरी समय पर माल परिवहन सुनिश्चित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดส่งพื้นที่หลังท่าที่มีประสิทธิภาพช่วยให้ขนส่งสินค้าตรงเวลา
usageTranslations.id: Pengiriman hinterland yang efisien memastikan pergerakan barang tepat waktu.

terms.definition: A shipping contract where a vessel is hired for a single voyage between specified ports, with payment based on cargo quantity or lumpsum.
terms.usage: The exporter signed a voyage charter for a one-time shipment of steel coils from Rotterdam to Shanghai.

termTranslations.th: เช่าเหมาลำเดินทาง

usageTranslations.en: The exporter signed a voyage charter for a one-time shipment of steel coils from Rotterdam to Shanghai.
usageTranslations.tr: İhracatçı, Rotterdam’dan Şanghay’a tek seferlik çelik sevkiyatı için seferlik çarter sözleşmesi imzaladı.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exportateur a signé un affrètement au voyage pour une expédition unique.
usageTranslations.de: Der Exporteur schloss einen Reisecharter für einmaligen Stahlexport ab.
usageTranslations.es: El exportador firmó un fletamento por viaje para un envío único.
usageTranslations.zh: 出口商为单次钢卷运输签署了航次租船合同。
usageTranslations.ar: وقع المصدر استئجار رحلة لشحنة واحدة.
usageTranslations.pt: O exportador firmou afretamento de viagem para um embarque único.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспортер заключил вояж-чартер для однократной перевозки.
usageTranslations.ja: 輸出業者はロッテルダム～上海の一度きりの契約を締結した。
usageTranslations.it: L’esportatore ha firmato un nolo a viaggio per una spedizione unica.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà xuất khẩu ký thuê tàu chuyến cho một lô thép.
usageTranslations.hi: निर्यातक ने एक बार के माल के लिए वॉयज चार्टर साइन किया।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ส่งออกเซ็นสัญญาเช่าเหมาลำเดินทางครั้งเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Eksportir menandatangani charter perjalanan untuk satu pengiriman.

terms.definition: A freight movement under a single contract involving at least two different transport modes (e.g., sea, rail, truck, air), typically with one responsible carrier.
terms.usage: Multimodal transport simplifies international supply chains by allowing goods to move seamlessly across different carriers.

termTranslations.th: การขนส่งหลายรูปแบบ

usageTranslations.en: Multimodal transport simplifies international supply chains by allowing goods to move seamlessly across different carriers.
usageTranslations.tr: Çoklu taşıma, malların farklı taşıyıcılar arasında sorunsuzca hareket etmesini sağlayarak tedarik zincirini kolaylaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transport multimodal facilite la chaîne logistique en combinant plusieurs modes de transport.
usageTranslations.de: Multimodaler Verkehr vereinfacht Lieferketten durch durchgängige Beförderung.
usageTranslations.es: El transporte multimodal facilita la logística internacional con diferentes modos.
usageTranslations.zh: 多式联运使货物可跨不同承运人无缝运输，从而简化供应链。
usageTranslations.ar: النقل المتعدد الوسائط يبسط سلاسل الإمداد الدولية.
usageTranslations.pt: O transporte multimodal simplifica a cadeia logística internacional.
usageTranslations.ru: Мультимодальные перевозки упрощают международные цепочки поставок.
usageTranslations.ja: 複合一貫輸送は複数業者間で円滑な輸送を実現する。
usageTranslations.it: Il trasporto multimodale semplifica la catena di fornitura.
usageTranslations.vi: Vận tải đa phương thức giúp chuỗi cung ứng quốc tế thuận lợi hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: मल्टीमोडल परिवहन से सप्लाई चेन सहज होती है।
usageTranslations.th: การขนส่งหลายรูปแบบทำให้ห่วงโซ่อุปทานระหว่างประเทศง่ายขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Transportasi multimoda mempermudah rantai pasok internasional.

terms.definition: The logistics practice of directly transferring goods from inbound to outbound vehicles, reducing or eliminating storage time.
terms.usage: Crossdocking operations improve supply chain speed for fast-moving consumer goods.

termTranslations.ja: クロスドッキング作業
termTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการ Crossdocking

usageTranslations.en: Crossdocking operations improve supply chain speed for fast-moving consumer goods.
usageTranslations.tr: Crossdock operasyonları, hızlı tüketim mallarında tedarik zinciri hızını artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les opérations de cross-docking accélèrent la chaîne logistique.
usageTranslations.de: Crossdocking-Vorgänge erhöhen die Geschwindigkeit in der Lieferkette.
usageTranslations.es: Las operaciones crossdocking aceleran la cadena de suministro.
usageTranslations.zh: 交叉转运作业提升了快消品供应链速度。
usageTranslations.ar: تحسن عمليات العبور المباشر سرعة سلسلة التوريد.
usageTranslations.pt: Operações de crossdocking aumentam a velocidade da cadeia de suprimentos.
usageTranslations.ru: Операции кросс-докинга ускоряют поставки потребительских товаров.
usageTranslations.ja: クロスドッキング作業はサプライチェーンの速度を向上させます。
usageTranslations.it: Le operazioni di crossdocking velocizzano la supply chain.
usageTranslations.vi: Crossdocking giúp tăng tốc chuỗi cung ứng hàng tiêu dùng nhanh.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रॉसडॉकिंग ऑपरेशन से सप्लाई चेन तेजी से चलती है।
usageTranslations.th: ปฏิบัติการ Crossdocking ช่วยเพิ่มความเร็วของซัพพลายเชน
usageTranslations.id: Operasi crossdocking mempercepat rantai pasok barang konsumen.

terms.definition: A medium-sized crude oil or product tanker with a deadweight between 80,000 and 120,000 metric tons, optimized for maximum capacity within AFRA freight scale. Common in global seaborne oil trade.
terms.usage: The port can accommodate Aframax tankers, which are ideal for regional crude oil shipments due to their size and capacity.

termTranslations.ja: アフラマックス型タンカー
termTranslations.th: เรือบรรทุกน้ำมัน Aframax

usageTranslations.en: The port can accommodate Aframax tankers, which are ideal for regional crude oil shipments due to their size and capacity.
usageTranslations.tr: Liman, boyutları ve kapasiteleri nedeniyle bölgesel ham petrol taşımacılığı için ideal olan Aframax tankerlerini kabul edebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le port peut accueillir des pétroliers Aframax, idéaux pour le transport régional de brut en raison de leur taille et capacité.
usageTranslations.de: Der Hafen kann Aframax-Tanker aufnehmen, die aufgrund ihrer Größe und Kapazität für regionale Rohöllieferungen geeignet sind.
usageTranslations.es: El puerto puede recibir petroleros Aframax, ideales para envíos regionales de crudo por su tamaño y capacidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 该港口可停靠阿芙拉型油轮，非常适合区域性原油运输。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن للميناء استقبال ناقلات أفرا ماكس المثالية لشحنات النفط الإقليمية بسبب حجمها وسعتها.
usageTranslations.pt: O porto pode acomodar navios Aframax, ideais para embarques regionais de petróleo bruto devido ao seu tamanho e capacidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Порт может принимать танкеры Афрамакс, которые идеально подходят для региональных перевозок нефти благодаря своим размерам и грузоподъёмности.
usageTranslations.ja: 港湾はアフラマックス型タンカーに対応しており、その大きさと積載量が地域原油輸送に最適です。
usageTranslations.it: Il porto può ospitare petroliere Aframax, ideali per spedizioni regionali di greggio grazie a dimensioni e capacità.
usageTranslations.vi: Cảng có thể tiếp nhận tàu dầu Aframax, phù hợp cho vận chuyển dầu thô khu vực nhờ kích thước và sức chứa.
usageTranslations.hi: बंदरगाह अफ्रामैक्स टैंकरों को संभाल सकता है, जो आकार और क्षमता के कारण क्षेत्रीय कच्चे तेल शिपमेंट के लिए आदर्श हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ท่าเรือสามารถรองรับเรือ Aframax ซึ่งเหมาะสำหรับขนส่งน้ำมันดิบในภูมิภาคด้วยขนาดและความจุ
usageTranslations.id: Pelabuhan dapat menampung tanker Aframax yang ideal untuk pengiriman minyak mentah regional karena ukuran dan kapasitasnya.

terms.definition: A refrigerated shipping container designed for the transport of perishable goods under controlled temperature, commonly used for food, pharmaceuticals, and chemicals in global trade.
terms.usage: A reefer container is required for the export of frozen seafood to maintain the correct temperature throughout the supply chain.

termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ห้องเย็น

usageTranslations.en: A reefer container is required for the export of frozen seafood to maintain the correct temperature throughout the supply chain.
usageTranslations.tr: Donmuş deniz ürünlerinin ihracatı için tedarik zinciri boyunca doğru sıcaklığın korunması amacıyla soğutuculu konteyner gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un conteneur frigorifique est nécessaire pour l’exportation de fruits de mer surgelés afin de maintenir la température adéquate tout au long de la chaîne logistique.
usageTranslations.de: Für den Export von Tiefkühlmeeresfrüchten wird ein Kühlcontainer benötigt, um die richtige Temperatur während der gesamten Lieferkette zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: Se requiere un contenedor reefer para la exportación de mariscos congelados y mantener la temperatura adecuada.
usageTranslations.zh: 出口冷冻海鲜需使用冷藏集装箱，以在整个供应链中保持适宜温度。
usageTranslations.ar: مطلوب حاوية مبردة لتصدير المأكولات البحرية المجمدة والحفاظ على درجة الحرارة المناسبة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um contentor reefer é necessário para exportação de frutos do mar congelados para manter a temperatura adequada.
usageTranslations.ru: Для экспорта замороженных морепродуктов требуется рефконтейнер для поддержания нужной температуры по всей цепочке поставок.
usageTranslations.ja: 冷凍シーフードの輸出にはサプライチェーン全体で適切な温度を維持するためリーファーコンテナが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Un container refrigerato è necessario per l’export di frutti di mare surgelati per mantenere la temperatura corretta.
usageTranslations.vi: Cần có container lạnh để xuất khẩu hải sản đông lạnh nhằm giữ nhiệt độ phù hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: जमे हुए समुद्री खाद्य के निर्यात के लिए पूरे सप्लाई चेन में सही तापमान बनाए रखने के लिए रीफर कंटेनर आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องใช้ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ห้องเย็นสำหรับส่งออกอาหารทะเลแช่แข็งเพื่อรักษาอุณหภูมิที่เหมาะสมตลอดซัพพลายเชน
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer reefer diperlukan untuk ekspor makanan laut beku demi menjaga suhu yang tepat di seluruh rantai pasok.

terms.definition: The process of filling a flexitank—a flexible bulk liquid container—inside a standard dry container for the transport of non-hazardous liquids, such as edible oils or wines.
terms.usage: Flexitank loading requires strict procedures to prevent leakage and contamination during the shipment of bulk liquid cargo.

termTranslations.th: การบรรทุก Flexitank

usageTranslations.en: Flexitank loading requires strict procedures to prevent leakage and contamination during the shipment of bulk liquid cargo.
usageTranslations.tr: Dökme sıvı yük taşımacılığında sızıntı ve kontaminasyonu önlemek için flexitank yüklemesi titiz prosedürler gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chargement de flexitank nécessite des procédures strictes pour éviter les fuites et la contamination lors du transport de liquides en vrac.
usageTranslations.de: Die Flexitank-Beladung erfordert strenge Verfahren zur Vermeidung von Leckagen und Kontamination bei Flüssigmassengütern.
usageTranslations.es: La carga de flexitank requiere procedimientos estrictos para evitar fugas y contaminación en envíos de líquidos a granel.
usageTranslations.zh: 柔性罐装载需严格流程，以防止散装液体货物运输中的泄漏和污染。
usageTranslations.ar: يتطلب تحميل فليكسي تانك إجراءات صارمة لمنع التسرب والتلوث أثناء شحن السوائل السائبة.
usageTranslations.pt: O carregamento de flexitank exige procedimentos rigorosos para evitar vazamentos e contaminação no transporte de líquidos a granel.
usageTranslations.ru: Загрузка флекситанка требует строгих процедур для предотвращения утечек и загрязнений при перевозке наливных грузов.
usageTranslations.ja: フレキシタンクの積載にはバルク液体貨物輸送時の漏洩と汚染を防ぐため厳密な手順が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Il caricamento del flexitank richiede procedure rigorose per evitare perdite e contaminazioni nel trasporto di liquidi sfusi.
usageTranslations.vi: Nạp flexitank cần quy trình nghiêm ngặt để tránh rò rỉ và nhiễm bẩn khi vận chuyển chất lỏng số lượng lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: थोक तरल माल की शिपमेंट के दौरान रिसाव और संदूषण को रोकने के लिए फ्लेक्सिटैंक लोडिंग के लिए सख्त प्रक्रियाएं आवश्यक हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การบรรทุก Flexitank ต้องปฏิบัติตามขั้นตอนอย่างเข้มงวดเพื่อป้องกันการรั่วซึมและการปนเปื้อนในการขนส่งของเหลวจำนวนมาก
usageTranslations.id: Pemuatan flexitank membutuhkan prosedur ketat untuk mencegah kebocoran dan kontaminasi selama pengiriman cairan curah.

terms.definition: A formal contract between a shipowner and a charterer specifying terms for the hire and use of a vessel, including freight, laytime, demurrage, and responsibilities.
terms.usage: The charterparty agreement specified laytime allowances, demurrage rates, and cargo responsibilities for both the shipowner and the charterer.

termTranslations.ja: チャーターパーティー契約
termTranslations.th: ข้อตกลงเช่าเรือ

usageTranslations.en: The charterparty agreement specified laytime allowances, demurrage rates, and cargo responsibilities for both the shipowner and the charterer.
usageTranslations.tr: Charterparty sözleşmesinde laytime süreleri, demuraj oranları ve hem gemi sahibi hem de kiracı için yük sorumlulukları belirtildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le contrat d’affrètement précisait les délais de séjour, les taux de surestaries et les responsabilités relatives à la cargaison pour l’armateur et l’affréteur.
usageTranslations.de: Im Chartervertrag wurden Liegezeiten, Demurragesätze und Ladungsverantwortlichkeiten für Reeder und Charterer festgelegt.
usageTranslations.es: El contrato de fletamento especificaba tiempos de estadía, tasas de demoras y responsabilidades de la carga tanto para el propietario como para el fletador.
usageTranslations.zh: 租船合同明确规定了租期、滞期费及船东与租船人双方的货物责任。
usageTranslations.ar: حددت اتفاقية تشارتر بارتي مخصصات وقت الإرساء ومعدلات رسوم التأخير ومسؤوليات الشحن للطرفين.
usageTranslations.pt: O contrato de afretamento especificou prazos de laytime, taxas de demurrage e responsabilidades de carga para armador e afretador.
usageTranslations.ru: Чартерное соглашение определяет время стоянки, ставки демерреджа и обязанности по грузу для судовладельца и фрахтователя.
usageTranslations.ja: チャーターパーティー契約では、レイタイム、滞船料、荷責任が船主と傭船者の双方に明記されていた。
usageTranslations.it: Il contratto di noleggio specificava i tempi di laytime, le tariffe di demurrage e le responsabilità del carico per armatore e noleggiatore.
usageTranslations.vi: Hợp đồng thuê tàu quy định rõ thời gian laytime, mức phạt demurrage và trách nhiệm hàng hóa cho cả chủ tàu và người thuê.
usageTranslations.hi: चार्टर पार्टी अनुबंध में लेटाइम भत्ते, डेमरेज दरें और दोनों पक्षों की माल जिम्मेदारियां निर्दिष्ट थीं।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อตกลงเช่าเรือกำหนดเวลาพักเรือ อัตราค่าปรับ demurrage และความรับผิดชอบของสินค้าแก่ทั้งเจ้าของเรือและผู้เช่า
usageTranslations.id: Perjanjian charterparty menetapkan waktu laytime, tarif demurrage, dan tanggung jawab kargo untuk pemilik kapal dan penyewa.

terms.definition: The maximum weight a vessel can safely carry, including cargo, fuel, crew, supplies, and provisions, measured in metric tons (DWT).
terms.usage: The vessel’s deadweight tonnage determines the total permissible cargo and supplies it can carry on a voyage.

termTranslations.th: น้ำหนักบรรทุกสูงสุด

usageTranslations.en: The vessel’s deadweight tonnage determines the total permissible cargo and supplies it can carry on a voyage.
usageTranslations.tr: Geminin deadweight tonajı, bir seferde taşıyabileceği toplam yük ve ikmal miktarını belirler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le port en lourd du navire détermine la cargaison et les approvisionnements autorisés pour un voyage.
usageTranslations.de: Die Tragfähigkeit des Schiffes bestimmt die zulässige Fracht- und Versorgungslast auf einer Reise.
usageTranslations.es: El tonelaje de peso muerto del buque determina la carga y suministros permitidos para el viaje.
usageTranslations.zh: 船舶的载重吨位决定其航程中可携带的全部货物和补给品总量。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد حمولة الوزن الميت للسفينة إجمالي البضائع والإمدادات المسموح بنقلها في الرحلة.
usageTranslations.pt: O porte bruto do navio determina a carga e suprimentos permitidos em uma viagem.
usageTranslations.ru: Дедвейт судна определяет максимально допустимый вес груза и припасов на рейсе.
usageTranslations.ja: 船舶の載貨重量トン数は航海で積載可能な貨物と補給品の総量を決める。
usageTranslations.it: La portata lorda della nave determina il carico e i rifornimenti permessi per il viaggio.
usageTranslations.vi: Trọng tải toàn phần của tàu quyết định tổng lượng hàng hóa và vật tư được phép chở trên chuyến đi.
usageTranslations.hi: जहाज का डेडवेट टननेज यात्रा पर ले जा सकने वाले कुल माल और आपूर्ति को निर्धारित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: น้ำหนักบรรทุกสูงสุดของเรือกำหนดน้ำหนักสินค้ารวมที่สามารถบรรทุกได้ในการเดินทาง
usageTranslations.id: Deadweight tonnage kapal menentukan total muatan dan suplai yang diizinkan untuk dibawa dalam pelayaran.

terms.definition: The mandatory inspection and certification procedures required by national or international plant protection authorities to prevent the introduction and spread of pests or diseases via traded agricultural commodities or packaging.
terms.usage: All imported produce must pass phytosanitary control at the designated border inspection post before entering the domestic market.

termTranslations.th: การควบคุมสุขอนามัยพืช

usageTranslations.en: All imported produce must pass phytosanitary control at the designated border inspection post before entering the domestic market.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm ithal ürünler, iç piyasaya girmeden önce belirlenen sınır kontrol noktasında fitosaniter kontrolden geçmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous les produits importés doivent subir un contrôle phytosanitaire au poste d'inspection frontalier désigné avant d'entrer sur le marché intérieur.
usageTranslations.de: Alle importierten Produkte müssen vor dem Eintritt in den Binnenmarkt die Pflanzengesundheitskontrolle am vorgesehenen Grenzkontrollpunkt bestehen.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los productos importados deben pasar el control fitosanitario en el puesto de inspección fronterizo designado antes de ingresar al mercado nacional.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有进口农产品在进入国内市场前，必须通过指定边境检查站的植物检疫监管。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تخضع جميع المنتجات المستوردة للرقابة الصحية النباتية في نقطة التفتيش الحدودية المعينة قبل دخول السوق المحلية.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos os produtos importados devem passar pelo controle fitossanitário no posto de inspeção fronteiriço designado antes de entrar no mercado interno.
usageTranslations.ru: Вся импортируемая продукция должна пройти фитосанитарный контроль на назначенном пограничном пункте проверки до поступления на внутренний рынок.
usageTranslations.ja: すべての輸入農産物は国内市場に入る前に指定された国境検査所で植物検疫管理を受ける必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Tutti i prodotti importati devono superare il controllo fitosanitario presso il posto di ispezione di frontiera designato prima di entrare nel mercato interno.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả nông sản nhập khẩu phải qua kiểm dịch thực vật tại trạm kiểm soát biên giới được chỉ định trước khi vào thị trường nội địa.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी आयातित उत्पादों को घरेलू बाजार में प्रवेश करने से पहले निर्धारित सीमा जांच चौकी पर पादप संगरोध नियंत्रण से गुजरना अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: สินค้านำเข้าทุกชนิดต้องผ่านการควบคุมสุขอนามัยพืชที่จุดตรวจชายแดนที่กำหนดก่อนเข้าสู่ตลาดภายในประเทศ
usageTranslations.id: Semua produk impor harus melewati pengendalian fitto saniter di pos pemeriksaan perbatasan yang ditunjuk sebelum memasuki pasar domestik.

terms.definition: The total internal volume of a vessel measured in tons, as defined by the International Convention on Tonnage Measurement of Ships (1969), used for registration, port fees, and safety regulations.
terms.usage: Gross tonnage determines a vessel’s eligibility for port entry, registration fees, and safety compliance inspections.

termTranslations.th: ตันเนจสุทธิ

usageTranslations.en: Gross tonnage determines a vessel’s eligibility for port entry, registration fees, and safety compliance inspections.
usageTranslations.tr: Gross tonaj, bir geminin limana giriş, tescil ücretleri ve güvenlik denetimleri için uygunluğunu belirler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tonnage brut détermine l’éligibilité d’un navire à l’entrée au port, les frais d’enregistrement et les inspections de conformité de sécurité.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bruttoraumzahl bestimmt die Zulassung eines Schiffes für den Hafenzugang, Registrierungsgebühren und Sicherheitsinspektionen.
usageTranslations.es: El tonelaje bruto determina la elegibilidad de un buque para la entrada al puerto, tasas de registro e inspecciones de seguridad.
usageTranslations.zh: 总吨位决定船舶入港、注册费用及安全合规检查资格。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد الحمولة الإجمالية أهلية السفينة لدخول الميناء ورسوم التسجيل وفحوصات الامتثال للسلامة.
usageTranslations.pt: A arqueação bruta determina a elegibilidade do navio para entrada no porto, taxas de registro e inspeções de segurança.
usageTranslations.ru: Брутто-регистровая вместимость определяет право судна на вход в порт, размер регистрационных сборов и прохождение проверок по безопасности.
usageTranslations.ja: 総トン数は船舶の港湾入港、登録料、安全検査の適格性を決める。
usageTranslations.it: La stazza lorda determina l’idoneità di una nave all’ingresso in porto, le tasse di registrazione e i controlli di sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Tổng dung tích quyết định quyền vào cảng, phí đăng ký và kiểm tra an toàn của tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: ग्रॉस टननेज जहाज की बंदरगाह प्रवेश, पंजीकरण शुल्क और सुरक्षा जांच के लिए पात्रता निर्धारित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตันเนจสุทธิเป็นตัวกำหนดคุณสมบัติของเรือในการเข้าท่าเรือ ค่าธรรมเนียมการลงทะเบียน และการตรวจสอบความปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Gross tonnage menentukan kelayakan kapal untuk masuk pelabuhan, biaya registrasi, dan inspeksi keselamatan.

terms.definition: The volume of a ship’s cargo spaces, measured in tons according to the International Convention on Tonnage Measurement of Ships (1969), used to determine port fees and canal tolls.
terms.usage: Net tonnage is used to calculate canal transit fees and other port-related charges based on the ship’s earning spaces.

termTranslations.th: ตันเนจสุทธิ

usageTranslations.en: Net tonnage is used to calculate canal transit fees and other port-related charges based on the ship’s earning spaces.
usageTranslations.tr: Net tonaj, kanal geçiş ücretleri ve limanla ilgili diğer harçların, geminin gelir getiren alanlarına göre hesaplanmasında kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tonnage net sert à calculer les droits de transit des canaux et autres frais portuaires selon les espaces commerciaux du navire.
usageTranslations.de: Die Nettoraumzahl dient zur Berechnung von Kanaldurchfahrtsgebühren und anderen hafenbezogenen Kosten auf Basis der nutzbaren Laderäume.
usageTranslations.es: El tonelaje neto se utiliza para calcular las tasas de tránsito por canales y otros cargos portuarios según los espacios de carga del buque.
usageTranslations.zh: 净吨位用于按船舶的可盈利空间计算运河通行费及港口相关费用。
usageTranslations.ar: تُستخدم الحمولة الصافية لحساب رسوم عبور القناة وغيرها من الرسوم المتعلقة بالموانئ بناءً على مساحات الكسب في السفينة.
usageTranslations.pt: A arqueação líquida é usada para calcular taxas de trânsito de canais e outras tarifas portuárias com base nos espaços produtivos do navio.
usageTranslations.ru: Нетто-регистровая вместимость используется для расчёта сборов за проход через каналы и другие портовые сборы, исходя из грузовых помещений судна.
usageTranslations.ja: 純トン数は運河通行料や港湾料金を算出する際の収益空間を基準に用いられる。
usageTranslations.it: La stazza netta viene utilizzata per calcolare le tariffe di transito dei canali e le altre tasse portuali in base agli spazi commerciali della nave.
usageTranslations.vi: Dung tích tịnh dùng để tính phí kênh đào và các phí liên quan đến cảng dựa trên không gian khai thác của tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: नेट टननेज का उपयोग नहर शुल्क और अन्य बंदरगाह शुल्क की गणना के लिए किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตันเนจสุทธิมีไว้สำหรับคำนวณค่าผ่านคลองและค่าธรรมเนียมท่าเรือตามพื้นที่ใช้สอยของเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Net tonnage digunakan untuk menghitung biaya transit kanal dan biaya pelabuhan lainnya berdasarkan ruang penghasilan kapal.

terms.definition: The operational process of loading or unloading vehicles, containers, or cargo using a ramp at a terminal, port, or warehouse, often involving Ro-Ro vessels or trailers.
