terms.usage: A flatbed truck was contracted to move steel beams for a construction project, as documented in the CMR waybill.

termTranslations.ja: フラットベッドトラック
termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกพื้นเรียบ

usageTranslations.en: A flatbed truck was contracted to move steel beams for a construction project, as documented in the CMR waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir inşaat projesi için çelik kirişleri taşımak üzere dorse kamyon CMR taşıma senedinde belirtildiği şekilde görevlendirildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Un camion plateau a été loué pour transporter des poutres en acier pour un projet de construction, tel que stipulé sur la lettre de voiture CMR.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Pritschenwagen wurde laut CMR-Frachtbrief für den Transport von Stahlträgern zu einer Baustelle beauftragt.
usageTranslations.es: Se contrató un camión plataforma para trasladar vigas de acero a un proyecto de construcción, según la carta de porte CMR.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据CMR货运单，平板卡车被用于运输建筑用钢梁。
usageTranslations.ar: تم التعاقد مع شاحنة مسطحة لنقل عوارض فولاذية لمشروع بناء وفقًا لبوليصة الشحن CMR.
usageTranslations.pt: Um caminhão plataforma foi contratado para transportar vigas de aço para um projeto de construção, conforme consta na nota CMR.
usageTranslations.ru: Для перевозки стальных балок на стройплощадку был нанят бортовой грузовик, как указано в CMR-накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: CMR運送状に記載されているように、建設プロジェクト用の鉄骨輸送にフラットベッドトラックが手配された。
usageTranslations.it: Un camion pianale è stato noleggiato per trasportare travi d’acciaio per un progetto edile come da lettera di vettura CMR.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe tải sàn được thuê để chở dầm thép cho dự án xây dựng theo vận đơn CMR.
usageTranslations.hi: CMR वेबिल के अनुसार निर्माण परियोजना के लिए स्टील बीम ले जाने के लिए फ्लैटबेड ट्रक अनुबंधित किया गया था।
usageTranslations.th: มีการว่าจ้างรถบรรทุกพื้นเรียบสำหรับขนส่งคานเหล็กสำหรับโครงการก่อสร้างตามใบขนส่ง CMR
usageTranslations.id: Truk flatbed dikontrak untuk memindahkan balok baja proyek konstruksi sesuai dokumen waybill CMR.

terms.definition: A vehicle with a cylindrical tank body designed for the bulk transport of liquids, chemicals, or fuels, referenced in ADR transport documents, dangerous goods declarations, and CMR consignment notes.
terms.usage: The tank truck transported hazardous chemicals under ADR rules, with all documentation and placards as required for dangerous goods carriage.

termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกถัง

usageTranslations.en: The tank truck transported hazardous chemicals under ADR rules, with all documentation and placards as required for dangerous goods carriage.
usageTranslations.tr: Tanker kamyon, ADR kurallarına uygun olarak tehlikeli kimyasalları tüm belgeler ve ikaz levhalarıyla taşıdı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le camion citerne a transporté des produits chimiques dangereux sous règlement ADR, avec toute la documentation et la signalisation requises.
usageTranslations.de: Der Tankwagen transportierte Gefahrstoffe gemäß ADR-Vorschriften mit allen erforderlichen Dokumenten und Warntafeln.
usageTranslations.es: El camión cisterna transportó productos químicos peligrosos bajo las reglas ADR, con toda la documentación y señalización requerida.
usageTranslations.zh: 罐式卡车根据ADR规定运输危险化学品，配备所有所需文件和标识。
usageTranslations.ar: نقلت شاحنة الصهريج المواد الكيميائية الخطرة بموجب قواعد ADR وجميع الوثائق واللوحات المطلوبة.
usageTranslations.pt: O caminhão tanque transportou produtos químicos perigosos conforme normas ADR, com toda documentação e sinalização exigida.
usageTranslations.ru: Автоцистерна перевозила опасные химикаты по правилам ADR с необходимыми документами и табличками.
usageTranslations.ja: タンクローリーはADR規則に基づき、必要な書類と標識付きで危険化学物質を運びました。
usageTranslations.it: L’autocisterna ha trasportato sostanze chimiche pericolose secondo le norme ADR, con tutta la documentazione e le targhe richieste.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe bồn vận chuyển hóa chất nguy hiểm theo quy định ADR với đầy đủ tài liệu và biển báo cần thiết.
usageTranslations.hi: टैंक ट्रक ने ADR नियमों के तहत खतरनाक रसायन सभी दस्तावेज़ों और चिह्नों के साथ पहुँचाए।
usageTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกถังขนส่งสารเคมีอันตรายตามกฎ ADR พร้อมเอกสารและป้ายที่กำหนด
usageTranslations.id: Truk tangki mengangkut bahan kimia berbahaya sesuai aturan ADR beserta dokumen dan plakat yang diperlukan.

terms.definition: A truck equipped with refrigeration units to transport perishable goods under controlled temperature; referenced in CMR waybills, sanitary certificates, and carrier schedules for cold chain logistics.
terms.usage: The refrigerated truck delivered fresh produce under strict temperature monitoring, with temperature logs attached to the CMR waybill.

termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกห้องเย็น

usageTranslations.en: The refrigerated truck delivered fresh produce under strict temperature monitoring, with temperature logs attached to the CMR waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Frigorifik kamyon, sıcaklık kayıtları CMR taşıma senedine eklenerek, taze ürünleri sıkı sıcaklık kontrolü altında teslim etti.
usageTranslations.fr: Le camion frigorifique a livré des produits frais sous contrôle de température strict, avec les relevés de température annexés à la lettre de voiture CMR.
usageTranslations.de: Der Kühlwagen lieferte Frischwaren unter strenger Temperaturüberwachung, Temperaturprotokolle waren an die CMR-Frachtbrief angehängt.
usageTranslations.es: El camión refrigerado entregó productos frescos bajo estricto control de temperatura, adjuntando los registros a la carta de porte CMR.
usageTranslations.zh: 冷藏卡车在严格温控下运送新鲜农产品，温度记录附在CMR货运单上。
usageTranslations.ar: سلمت الشاحنة المبردة المنتجات الطازجة تحت مراقبة درجة حرارة صارمة مع إرفاق سجلات الحرارة ببوليصة الشحن CMR.
usageTranslations.pt: O caminhão refrigerado entregou produtos frescos sob rigoroso monitoramento, com registros anexados à nota CMR.
usageTranslations.ru: Рефрижератор доставил свежие продукты под строгим контролем температуры, журналы температур приложены к CMR-накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: 冷蔵トラックはCMR運送状に温度記録を添付し、厳格な温度管理下で生鮮品を配送しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il camion frigorifero ha consegnato prodotti freschi sotto stretto controllo della temperatura, con i registri allegati alla polizza CMR.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe tải đông lạnh giao hàng tươi sống dưới sự giám sát nhiệt độ nghiêm ngặt, kèm bản ghi nhiệt độ vào vận đơn CMR.
usageTranslations.hi: रेफ्रिजरेटेड ट्रक ने सख्त तापमान निगरानी में ताजा उत्पादों की डिलीवरी की, तापमान लॉग CMR वेबिल में संलग्न थे।
usageTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกห้องเย็นส่งมอบผักผลไม้สดภายใต้การควบคุมอุณหภูมิอย่างเข้มงวด พร้อมแนบบันทึกอุณหภูมิในใบขนส่ง CMR
usageTranslations.id: Truk berpendingin mengantarkan hasil segar dengan pengawasan suhu ketat dan log suhu dilampirkan pada nota CMR.

terms.definition: A flat-bottomed vessel used for transporting heavy or bulk cargoes, often on inland waterways or for ship-to-shore operations, documented in waybills and port clearance documents.
terms.usage: The cargo barge transported machinery to the inland terminal, as recorded on the barge waybill for customs inspection.

termTranslations.th: แพขนสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: The cargo barge transported machinery to the inland terminal, as recorded on the barge waybill for customs inspection.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük şilebi, makineleri iç terminale taşıdı ve bu işlem şilep sevk irsaliyesinde gümrük kontrolü için kaydedildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chaland de fret a transporté des machines au terminal intérieur, enregistré sur la lettre de voiture pour inspection douanière.
usageTranslations.de: Der Lastkahn transportierte Maschinen zum Binnen-Terminal, dokumentiert auf dem Kahn-Frachtbrief für die Zollkontrolle.
usageTranslations.es: La gabarra de carga transportó maquinaria hasta la terminal interior, según la carta de porte fluvial para la inspección aduanera.
usageTranslations.zh: 货驳船将机械运输到内陆码头，并在驳船运单上记录以供海关检查。
usageTranslations.ar: نقل صندل الشحن المعدات إلى محطة داخلية كما هو مسجل في بوليصة الشحن لفحص الجمارك.
usageTranslations.pt: A barcaça de carga transportou máquinas ao terminal interior, conforme registrado no conhecimento de embarque para inspeção alfandegária.
usageTranslations.ru: Грузовая баржа доставила оборудование на внутренний терминал, что зафиксировано в накладной для таможни.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物バージは機械を内陸ターミナルへ運び、バージ運送状に通関用として記録された。
usageTranslations.it: La chiatta da carico ha trasportato macchinari al terminal interno, come registrato sulla polizza di carico per il controllo doganale.
usageTranslations.vi: Sà lan chở hàng vận chuyển máy móc tới cảng nội địa, được ghi trên vận đơn cho hải quan kiểm tra.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो बार्ज ने मशीनरी को इनलैंड टर्मिनल तक पहुँचाया, जो बार्ज वेबिल में सीमा शुल्क निरीक्षण हेतु दर्ज था।
usageTranslations.th: แพขนสินค้าได้ขนส่งเครื่องจักรไปยังท่าเรือในประเทศตามใบตราส่งสินค้าเพื่อตรวจสอบศุลกากร
usageTranslations.id: Tongkang kargo mengangkut mesin ke terminal darat, sesuai waybill tongkang untuk pemeriksaan bea cukai.

terms.definition: A vessel designed for cargo transport on inland waterways such as rivers and canals, referenced in FIATA documents and national water transport legislation.
terms.usage: The inland barge carried grain shipments under a FIATA multimodal bill of lading for export clearance.

termTranslations.th: แพขนสินค้าทางน้ำในประเทศ

usageTranslations.en: The inland barge carried grain shipments under a FIATA multimodal bill of lading for export clearance.
usageTranslations.tr: İç su yolu şilebi, FIATA çok modlu konşimentosu ile tahıl sevkiyatı yaptı ve ihracat işlemleri için kullanıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chaland fluvial a transporté des céréales avec un connaissement multimodal FIATA pour le dédouanement à l'export.
usageTranslations.de: Das Binnenschiff transportierte Getreide mit einem FIATA-Multimodal-Konnossement für die Ausfuhrabfertigung.
usageTranslations.es: La gabarra fluvial transportó cereales bajo un conocimiento de embarque multimodal FIATA para despacho de exportación.
usageTranslations.zh: 内河驳船根据FIATA多式联运提单运输谷物用于出口清关。
usageTranslations.ar: حملت الصندل النهري شحنات الحبوب بموجب بوليصة شحن متعددة الوسائط من FIATA للتخليص التصديري.
usageTranslations.pt: A barcaça fluvial transportou grãos sob conhecimento multimodal FIATA para liberação de exportação.
usageTranslations.ru: Речная баржа перевозила зерно по FIATA мультимодальному коносаменту для экспортного оформления.
usageTranslations.ja: 内陸バージはFIATA複合一貫運送証券のもと、穀物を輸送し輸出通関に用いられた。
usageTranslations.it: Il chiattone fluviale ha trasportato cereali con polizza di carico multimodale FIATA per lo sdoganamento all'esportazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Sà lan nội địa vận chuyển lúa mì theo vận đơn đa phương thức FIATA để thông quan xuất khẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: इनलैंड बार्ज ने FIATA मल्टीमॉडल बिल ऑफ लीडिंग के तहत अनाज का निर्यात किया।
usageTranslations.th: แพขนสินค้าทางน้ำในประเทศขนส่งธัญพืชภายใต้ใบตราส่ง FIATA เพื่อดำเนินการส่งออก
usageTranslations.id: Tongkang sungai mengangkut gandum dengan bill of lading multimodal FIATA untuk ekspor.

terms.definition: A general term for a vessel, usually seagoing, designed to carry all types of non-passenger cargo, referenced in bills of lading and international shipping contracts.
terms.usage: The cargo freighter’s bill of lading lists all shipped items and is required for customs import clearance.

termTranslations.th: เรือบรรทุกสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: The cargo freighter’s bill of lading lists all shipped items and is required for customs import clearance.
usageTranslations.tr: Yük gemisinin konşimentosu, tüm gönderilen kalemleri listeler ve gümrük ithalatı için zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le connaissement du navire de fret répertorie tous les articles expédiés, nécessaire pour le dédouanement à l'importation.
usageTranslations.de: Das Frachtbrief des Frachtschiffs listet alle versandten Güter auf und ist für die Zollabfertigung erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: El conocimiento de embarque del buque de carga enumera todos los artículos enviados y es necesario para la importación.
usageTranslations.zh: 货运船提单列出所有运输物品，是进口清关的必备文件。
usageTranslations.ar: تسرد بوليصة الشحن لسفينة الشحن جميع العناصر المنقولة، مطلوبة للتخليص الجمركي.
usageTranslations.pt: O conhecimento de embarque do navio de carga lista todos os itens enviados e é necessário para liberação de importação.
usageTranslations.ru: Коносамент грузового судна перечисляет все отправленные товары и требуется для таможенного оформления.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物船の船荷証券には全ての貨物が記載され、輸入通関に必要です。
usageTranslations.it: La polizza di carico della nave da carico elenca tutti gli articoli spediti ed è richiesta per lo sdoganamento all'importazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Vận đơn của tàu chở hàng liệt kê toàn bộ hàng hóa và bắt buộc khi làm thủ tục nhập khẩu.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो मालवाहक जहाज की बिल ऑफ लीडिंग सभी भेजी गई वस्तुओं की सूची देती है और सीमा शुल्क निकासी के लिए आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ใบตราส่งสินค้าเรือบรรทุกสินค้าระบุสินค้าทั้งหมดและจำเป็นต่อพิธีการศุลกากรขาเข้า
usageTranslations.id: Bill of lading kapal kargo mencantumkan semua barang yang dikirim dan wajib untuk bea cukai impor.

terms.definition: An airport or terminal equipment used to lift and transfer cargo pallets and containers onto aircraft or vehicles, cited in IATA Cargo-Handling Manuals.
terms.usage: The cargo loader positioned pallets onto the aircraft according to IATA loading instructions documented on the air waybill.

termTranslations.vi: Thiết bị xếp dỡ hàng hóa
termTranslations.th: เครื่องโหลดสินค้า

usageTranslations.en: The cargo loader positioned pallets onto the aircraft according to IATA loading instructions documented on the air waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Kargo yükleyici, hava konşimentosunda belgelenmiş IATA yükleme talimatlarına göre paletleri uçağa yerleştirdi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chargeur de fret a positionné les palettes dans l’avion selon les instructions de chargement IATA figurant sur la lettre de transport aérien.
usageTranslations.de: Der Frachtlader platzierte die Paletten nach IATA-Beladeanweisungen aus dem Luftfrachtbrief ins Flugzeug.
usageTranslations.es: El cargador de carga colocó los pallets en el avión según las instrucciones de IATA documentadas en la carta de porte aéreo.
usageTranslations.zh: 货物装载机根据航空运单上的IATA装载指令将托盘放上飞机。
usageTranslations.ar: قام رافع الشحن بوضع البضائع على الطائرة وفق تعليمات IATA المذكورة في بوليصة الشحن الجوي.
usageTranslations.pt: O carregador de carga posicionou paletes na aeronave conforme instruções IATA registradas no conhecimento aéreo.
usageTranslations.ru: Погрузчик груза разместил паллеты на самолёте по инструкциям IATA, указанным в авианакладной.
usageTranslations.ja: 貨物ローダーはIATA積載指示書に従い、航空運送状に基づきパレットを航空機に積載した。
usageTranslations.it: Il caricatore di merci ha posizionato i pallet sull’aeromobile secondo le istruzioni IATA sulla lettera di trasporto aereo.
usageTranslations.vi: Thiết bị xếp dỡ hàng hóa đặt pallet lên máy bay theo hướng dẫn IATA trên vận đơn hàng không.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्गो लोडर ने IATA निर्देशों के अनुसार एयर वेबिल में दर्ज दिशा-निर्देशों के अनुसार पैलेट विमान में रखे।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องโหลดสินค้าได้วางพาเลทขึ้นเครื่องบินตามคำแนะนำ IATA ที่ระบุในใบตราส่งทางอากาศ
usageTranslations.id: Alat pengangkut kargo menempatkan palet ke pesawat sesuai instruksi IATA di air waybill.

terms.definition: A conveyor-belt vehicle used at airports for loading and unloading baggage and cargo onto aircraft holds, as specified in IATA Ground Operations Manuals.
terms.usage: The belt loader was used to load baggage onto the aircraft hold, following procedures outlined in the IATA Ground Operations Manual.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องลำเลียงสายพาน

usageTranslations.en: The belt loader was used to load baggage onto the aircraft hold, following procedures outlined in the IATA Ground Operations Manual.
usageTranslations.tr: Bantlı yükleyici, IATA Yer Hizmetleri El Kitabında belirtilen prosedürlere uygun şekilde bagajı uçağın kargo bölümüne yükledi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chargeur à bande a été utilisé pour charger les bagages dans la soute, conformément aux procédures du Manuel IATA.
usageTranslations.de: Der Bandlader wurde zum Beladen des Gepäckraums verwendet, gemäß den IATA-Bodenbetriebsrichtlinien.
usageTranslations.es: El cargador de cinta se utilizó para cargar el equipaje en la bodega según el manual de operaciones terrestres IATA.
usageTranslations.zh: 皮带装载机用于将行李装载到飞机货舱，按IATA地面操作手册规定执行。
usageTranslations.ar: تم استخدام رافعة السير الناقل لتحميل الأمتعة إلى عنبر الطائرة وفقًا لإجراءات IATA.
usageTranslations.pt: O carregador de esteira foi utilizado para carregar bagagens no porão da aeronave, seguindo o Manual IATA.
usageTranslations.ru: Конвейерный погрузчик использовали для загрузки багажа в багажное отделение по инструкции IATA.
usageTranslations.ja: ベルトローダーはIATA地上業務マニュアルに従い、荷物を貨物室に積み込みました。
usageTranslations.it: Il caricatore a nastro è stato utilizzato per caricare i bagagli nella stiva secondo il manuale IATA.
usageTranslations.vi: Băng tải xếp dỡ được sử dụng để đưa hành lý vào khoang hàng theo hướng dẫn của IATA.
usageTranslations.hi: बेल्ट लोडर का उपयोग विमान के कार्गो होल्ड में सामान लोड करने के लिए IATA प्रक्रियाओं के तहत किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: ใช้เครื่องลำเลียงสายพานขนสัมภาระขึ้นเครื่องตามคู่มือปฏิบัติงานภาคพื้นของ IATA
usageTranslations.id: Pemuat sabuk digunakan untuk memuat bagasi ke kargo pesawat sesuai prosedur IATA.

terms.definition: A commercial road vehicle with flexible, retractable side curtains for rapid side-loading and unloading, used for general cargo and referenced in CMR waybills and loading instructions.
terms.usage: The curtain truck allows fast side-loading of palletized goods, making it suitable for cross-docking as stated on the CMR waybill.

termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกผ้าใบเลื่อน

usageTranslations.en: The curtain truck allows fast side-loading of palletized goods, making it suitable for cross-docking as stated on the CMR waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Branda kamyon, paletli yüklerin hızlı yan yüklemesine olanak tanır ve CMR taşıma senedinde belirtildiği gibi çapraz aktarma için uygundur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le camion à rideaux coulissants permet un chargement latéral rapide des palettes, idéal pour le cross-docking selon la lettre de voiture CMR.
usageTranslations.de: Der Planen-Lkw ermöglicht das schnelle seitliche Beladen von Paletten und eignet sich laut CMR-Frachtbrief für Cross-Docking.
usageTranslations.es: El camión cortina permite carga lateral rápida de palets, ideal para cross-docking según la carta de porte CMR.
usageTranslations.zh: 帘布卡车便于快速侧面装卸托盘货物，适合CMR货运单中提到的交叉转运。
usageTranslations.ar: تسمح شاحنة الستائر بالتحميل الجانبي السريع للبضائع المنقولة على منصات، كما هو مذكور في مذكرة CMR.
usageTranslations.pt: O caminhão sider permite carregamento lateral rápido de paletes, ideal para cross-docking conforme nota CMR.
usageTranslations.ru: Тентованный грузовик обеспечивает быструю боковую загрузку паллет, что делает его подходящим для кросс-докинга по CMR-накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: カーテントラックはパレット貨物の側面積み込みを迅速に行い、CMR運送状で指定されたクロスドッキングに適しています。
usageTranslations.it: Il camion centinato consente un rapido carico laterale dei pallet, ideale per il cross-docking come indicato nella polizza di carico CMR.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe tải bạt kéo cho phép bốc dỡ bên nhanh chóng, phù hợp cho cross-docking theo vận đơn CMR.
usageTranslations.hi: कर्टन ट्रक तेज साइड-लोडिंग की सुविधा देता है, जिससे यह CMR वेबिल के अनुसार क्रॉस-डॉकिंग के लिए उपयुक्त है।
usageTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกผ้าใบเลื่อนช่วยให้ขนถ่ายสินค้าด้านข้างได้อย่างรวดเร็ว เหมาะกับ cross-docking ตามใบส่งของ CMR
usageTranslations.id: Truk tirai memungkinkan pemuatan samping yang cepat dan cocok untuk cross-docking sesuai nota CMR.

terms.definition: A semi-trailer with two deck levels (lower rear deck and raised front deck), designed for transporting tall or oversize cargo not permitted on standard flatbeds. Cited in cargo manifests and road permits.
terms.usage: A stepdeck trailer was required to move machinery exceeding the legal height for standard trailers, as per the cargo manifest and road permit.

termTranslations.ja: ステップデックトレーラー
termTranslations.th: รถเทรลเลอร์สองชั้น

usageTranslations.en: A stepdeck trailer was required to move machinery exceeding the legal height for standard trailers, as per the cargo manifest and road permit.
usageTranslations.tr: Standart dorse için yasal yüksekliği aşan makineyi taşımak için, yük manifestosu ve yol izin belgesine göre alçak platform dorse gerekiyordu.
usageTranslations.fr: Une remorque surbaissée était nécessaire pour transporter des machines dépassant la hauteur légale selon le manifeste de chargement et le permis routier.
usageTranslations.de: Für den Transport von Maschinen, die die zulässige Höhe überschreiten, wurde laut Frachtmanifest und Straßen­genehmigung ein Tiefbettauflieger benötigt.
usageTranslations.es: Se requirió un remolque escalonado para trasladar maquinaria que excedía la altura permitida, según el manifiesto de carga y el permiso vial.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据货运单和公路许可证，运输超高机械需要阶梯式挂车。
usageTranslations.ar: كانت هناك حاجة إلى مقطورة ذات سطحين لنقل المعدات التي تتجاوز الارتفاع القانوني، وفقًا لقائمة الشحن وتصريح الطريق.
usageTranslations.pt: Foi necessário uma carreta stepdeck para transportar maquinário acima da altura legal conforme manifesto de carga e permissão rodoviária.
usageTranslations.ru: Для перевозки оборудования, превышающего разрешённую высоту, по манифесту и дорожному разрешению требовался низкорамный полуприцеп.
usageTranslations.ja: 積載明細書と道路許可証により、法定高さを超える機械輸送にはステップデックトレーラーが必要でした。
usageTranslations.it: Per trasportare macchinari oltre l'altezza legale, secondo il manifesto e il permesso stradale, era richiesto un rimorchio stepdeck.
usageTranslations.vi: Cần dùng moóc sàn bậc thang để vận chuyển máy móc vượt quá chiều cao cho phép, theo vận đơn và giấy phép đường bộ.
usageTranslations.hi: मानक ट्रेलर की वैध ऊंचाई से अधिक मशीनरी ले जाने के लिए, कार्गो मैनिफेस्ट और सड़क परमिट के अनुसार स्टेपडेक ट्रेलर आवश्यक था।
usageTranslations.th: จำเป็นต้องใช้รถเทรลเลอร์สองชั้นสำหรับขนส่งเครื่องจักรที่สูงเกินกว่ากฎหมายกำหนด ตามใบรายการสินค้าและใบอนุญาตถนน
usageTranslations.id: Dibutuhkan trailer stepdeck untuk memindahkan mesin yang melebihi tinggi legal menurut manifest barang dan izin jalan.

terms.definition: A semi-trailer with a deck that drops below the height of the tractor unit for extra vertical clearance, used for tall or heavy freight as specified in manifests and special transport permits.
terms.usage: The dropdeck trailer enabled transport of overheight crates without violating road height restrictions as required by the transport permit.

termTranslations.ja: ドロップデックトレーラー
termTranslations.th: รถเทรลเลอร์พื้นต่ำ

usageTranslations.en: The dropdeck trailer enabled transport of overheight crates without violating road height restrictions as required by the transport permit.
usageTranslations.tr: Düşük şasili dorse, taşıma iznine uygun olarak, yüksek kasaların yol yüksekliği sınırlarını aşmadan taşınmasını sağladı.
usageTranslations.fr: La remorque à plancher surbaissé a permis le transport de caisses hors gabarit sans enfreindre les restrictions de hauteur routière imposées par le permis.
usageTranslations.de: Der Tiefbettauflieger ermöglichte den Transport überhoher Kisten ohne Verletzung der Straßenzulassung gemäß Genehmigung.
usageTranslations.es: El remolque plataforma baja permitió transportar cajas altas sin infringir los límites de altura vial requeridos por el permiso.
usageTranslations.zh: 下沉式挂车允许运输超高货箱，且不违反运输许可规定的道路高度限制。
usageTranslations.ar: مكنت المقطورة الأرضية المنخفضة من نقل الصناديق ذات الارتفاع الزائد دون مخالفة قيود ارتفاع الطرق حسب تصريح النقل.
usageTranslations.pt: A carreta dropdeck possibilitou o transporte de caixas altas sem ultrapassar os limites de altura viária exigidos pela permissão.
usageTranslations.ru: Платформа с заниженной рамой позволила перевозить высокие ящики, не нарушая дорожные ограничения по высоте согласно разрешению.
usageTranslations.ja: ドロップデックトレーラーは道路高さ制限に違反せずに大型クレートの輸送を可能にしました。
usageTranslations.it: Il rimorchio dropdeck ha consentito il trasporto di casse alte senza violare i limiti di altezza stradale previsti dal permesso.
usageTranslations.vi: Moóc sàn thấp cho phép vận chuyển kiện hàng cao vượt mà không vi phạm giới hạn chiều cao đường bộ theo giấy phép.
usageTranslations.hi: ड्रॉपडेक ट्रेलर ने ट्रांसपोर्ट परमिट के अनुसार ऊँचे क्रेट्स को सड़क ऊँचाई सीमाओं का उल्लंघन किए बिना ले जाने में सक्षम बनाया।
usageTranslations.th: รถเทรลเลอร์พื้นต่ำช่วยให้ขนย้ายลังที่สูงเกินข้อกำหนดโดยไม่ผิดข้อจำกัดความสูงถนนตามใบอนุญาต
usageTranslations.id: Trailer dropdeck memungkinkan pengangkutan peti tinggi tanpa melanggar batas ketinggian jalan sesuai izin transportasi.

terms.definition: A rail freight wagon with a fully enclosed structure, used for transporting weather-sensitive general cargo; referenced in rail waybills and UIC documentation.
terms.usage: The box wagon was loaded with consumer goods for rail shipment, as documented in the rail waybill.

termTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกปิด

usageTranslations.en: The box wagon was loaded with consumer goods for rail shipment, as documented in the rail waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Kapalı vagon, demiryolu sevkiyatı için tüketim malları ile yüklendi ve bu durum demiryolu taşıma senedinde belgelendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le wagon couvert a été chargé de biens de consommation pour un transport ferroviaire selon la lettre de voiture.
usageTranslations.de: Der Güterwagen wurde für den Bahnversand mit Konsumgütern beladen, wie im Frachtbrief dokumentiert.
usageTranslations.es: El vagón cerrado fue cargado con productos de consumo para envío ferroviario, como figura en la carta de porte.
usageTranslations.zh: 箱式货车装载了消费品用于铁路运输，并记录在铁路运单中。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل عربة البضائع المغلقة بالبضائع الاستهلاكية للشحن بالقطار حسب بوليصة الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: O vagão fechado foi carregado com bens de consumo para embarque ferroviário conforme consta na nota ferroviária.
usageTranslations.ru: Крытый вагон был загружен потребительскими товарами для перевозки по железной дороге, как указано в накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: ボックスワゴンには鉄道輸送用の消費財が積まれ、運送状に記録されました。
usageTranslations.it: Il carro coperto è stato caricato con beni di consumo per la spedizione ferroviaria come da lettera di vettura.
usageTranslations.vi: Toa kín được xếp hàng tiêu dùng để vận chuyển bằng đường sắt, như ghi rõ trong vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: बॉक्स वैगन में उपभोक्ता सामान रेलवे शिपमेंट के लिए लादा गया, जैसा कि रेलवे वेबिल में दर्ज है।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกปิดถูกบรรจุด้วยสินค้าอุปโภคบริโภคสำหรับขนส่งทางรถไฟตามใบส่งของ
usageTranslations.id: Gerbong tertutup diisi barang konsumsi untuk pengiriman kereta api sesuai nota angkutan.

terms.definition: A rail freight wagon with a flat, open deck, designed for heavy, out-of-gauge, or containerized loads; referenced in UIC documentation, waybills, and terminal loading instructions.
terms.usage: The flat wagon was loaded with heavy machinery for international rail transport, as listed in the rail waybill.

termTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกพื้นเรียบ

usageTranslations.en: The flat wagon was loaded with heavy machinery for international rail transport, as listed in the rail waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Açık vagon, demiryolu taşıma senedinde belirtildiği gibi uluslararası demiryolu taşımacılığı için ağır makinelerle yüklendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le wagon plat a été chargé de machines lourdes pour un transport ferroviaire international selon la lettre de voiture.
usageTranslations.de: Der Flachwagen wurde gemäß Frachtbrief mit schweren Maschinen für den internationalen Bahntransport beladen.
usageTranslations.es: El vagón plataforma fue cargado con maquinaria pesada para transporte ferroviario internacional, según la carta de porte.
usageTranslations.zh: 平板货车装载了重型机械用于国际铁路运输，并记录在运单中。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل العربة المسطحة بالآلات الثقيلة للنقل بالسكك الحديدية الدولية حسب بوليصة الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: O vagão plataforma foi carregado com máquinas pesadas para transporte ferroviário internacional conforme nota ferroviária.
usageTranslations.ru: Платформенный вагон был загружен тяжелым оборудованием для международных ж/д перевозок, как указано в накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: フラットワゴンには国際鉄道輸送用の重機が積まれ、運送状に記載されています。
usageTranslations.it: Il carro pianale è stato caricato con macchinari pesanti per spedizione ferroviaria internazionale come da lettera di vettura.
usageTranslations.vi: Toa sàn được xếp máy móc nặng cho vận chuyển đường sắt quốc tế, như ghi rõ trong vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: फ्लैट वैगन में अंतर्राष्ट्रीय रेल परिवहन के लिए भारी मशीनरी लादी गई, जैसा कि रेलवे वेबिल में दर्ज है।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกพื้นเรียบถูกบรรจุเครื่องจักรหนักสำหรับขนส่งทางรถไฟระหว่างประเทศตามใบส่งของ
usageTranslations.id: Gerbong datar diisi mesin berat untuk transportasi kereta internasional sesuai nota angkutan.

terms.definition: Specialized ground equipment used at airports and cargo terminals for raising, positioning, and loading cargo pallets onto aircraft or trucks, as detailed in IATA Cargo Handling Manuals.
terms.usage: The pallet loader must be positioned parallel to the aircraft cargo door to ensure safe and efficient transfer of freight as per IATA procedures.

termTranslations.th: เครื่องโหลดพาเลท

usageTranslations.en: The pallet loader must be positioned parallel to the aircraft cargo door to ensure safe and efficient transfer of freight as per IATA procedures.
usageTranslations.tr: Palet yükleyici, IATA prosedürlerine göre güvenli ve verimli kargo transferi için uçak kargo kapısına paralel konumlandırılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chargeur de palettes doit être positionné parallèlement à la porte de soute pour un transfert sûr et efficace selon les procédures IATA.
usageTranslations.de: Der Palettenlader muss gemäß IATA-Richtlinien parallel zur Frachttür des Flugzeugs positioniert werden.
usageTranslations.es: El cargador de palés debe colocarse paralelo a la puerta de carga del avión para garantizar una transferencia segura y eficiente según IATA.
usageTranslations.zh: 托盘装载机必须与飞机货舱门平行放置，以确保按照IATA程序安全高效地转运货物。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب وضع رافعة المنصات موازية لباب شحن الطائرة لضمان نقل البضائع بأمان وكفاءة وفق إجراءات IATA.
usageTranslations.pt: O carregador de paletes deve ser posicionado paralelo à porta de carga da aeronave para garantir transferência segura conforme a IATA.
usageTranslations.ru: Паллетный погрузчик должен быть размещён параллельно грузовой двери самолёта для безопасной и эффективной загрузки по стандартам IATA.
usageTranslations.ja: パレットローダーはIATA手順に従い、航空機貨物ドアと平行に配置する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Il caricatore di pallet deve essere posizionato parallelamente alla porta del cargo per garantire un trasferimento sicuro secondo le procedure IATA.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe nâng pallet phải đặt song song với cửa khoang hàng để chuyển hàng an toàn theo hướng dẫn IATA.
usageTranslations.hi: IATA प्रक्रिया के अनुसार, पैलेट लोडर को विमान के कार्गो दरवाजे के समानांतर रखा जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องโหลดพาเลทต้องตั้งขนานกับประตูโหลดสัมภาระเพื่อถ่ายโอนสินค้าได้อย่างปลอดภัยตาม IATA
usageTranslations.id: Pengangkat palet harus ditempatkan sejajar dengan pintu kargo pesawat sesuai prosedur IATA.

terms.definition: A low, wheeled trailer used at airports to transport passenger baggage between terminals and aircraft, referenced in IATA Ground Operations documentation.
terms.usage: The baggage dolly was loaded with checked bags and towed to the aircraft, as noted in the ground operations log.

termTranslations.th: รถลากสัมภาระ

usageTranslations.en: The baggage dolly was loaded with checked bags and towed to the aircraft, as noted in the ground operations log.
usageTranslations.tr: Bagaj arabası, teslim edilen bagajlarla dolduruldu ve yer hizmetleri kayıtlarında belirtildiği gibi uçağa çekildi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chariot à bagages a été chargé et remorqué vers l'avion selon le journal des opérations au sol.
usageTranslations.de: Der Gepäckwagen wurde mit eingechecktem Gepäck beladen und zum Flugzeug gezogen, wie im Bodenbetriebsprotokoll vermerkt.
usageTranslations.es: El carrito portaequipajes fue cargado y remolcado al avión, como consta en el registro de operaciones terrestres.
usageTranslations.zh: 行李拖车装满托运行李，并按照地面操作记录拖至飞机。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل عربة الأمتعة بالحقائب المسجلة وسحبها إلى الطائرة كما هو مدون في سجل العمليات الأرضية.
usageTranslations.pt: A carreta de bagagem foi carregada e rebocada até a aeronave, conforme registro das operações em solo.
usageTranslations.ru: Багажная тележка была загружена зарегистрированным багажом и доставлена к самолёту, что отмечено в журнале наземных операций.
usageTranslations.ja: バゲージドーリーに預け入れ荷物が積まれ、地上作業記録に従って航空機に牽引された。
usageTranslations.it: Il carrello portabagagli è stato caricato e trainato fino all'aereo, come riportato nel registro delle operazioni di terra.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe kéo hành lý được chất đầy và kéo đến máy bay, được ghi lại trong nhật ký hoạt động mặt đất.
usageTranslations.hi: बैगेज डॉली में चेक किए गए बैग लादकर विमान तक पहुँचाया गया, जैसा कि ग्राउंड लॉग में दर्ज है।
usageTranslations.th: รถลากสัมภาระถูกบรรทุกกระเป๋าและลากไปที่เครื่องบินตามบันทึกภาคพื้นดิน
usageTranslations.id: Gerobak bagasi diisi koper dan ditarik ke pesawat sesuai catatan operasi darat.

terms.definition: A cargo ship equipped with refrigeration units for the transport of perishable goods under controlled temperature, referenced in carrier documents and perishable cargo manifests.
terms.usage: The reefer vessel maintained a temperature-controlled environment for shipping fruit to comply with perishable cargo requirements.

termTranslations.th: เรือเย็น

usageTranslations.en: The reefer vessel maintained a temperature-controlled environment for shipping fruit to comply with perishable cargo requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Soğutmalı gemi, bozulabilir kargo gereksinimlerini karşılamak için meyve taşımacılığında sıcaklık kontrollü ortam sağladı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le navire frigorifique a maintenu une température contrôlée pour le transport des fruits, conformément aux exigences pour les marchandises périssables.
usageTranslations.de: Das Kühlschiff sorgte für eine temperaturkontrollierte Umgebung beim Transport von Obst gemäß den Vorschriften für verderbliche Waren.
usageTranslations.es: El buque frigorífico mantuvo un entorno controlado para transportar frutas según requisitos de carga perecedera.
usageTranslations.zh: 冷藏船为运输水果维持了控温环境，符合易腐货物要求。
usageTranslations.ar: حافظت السفينة المبردة على بيئة محكمة الحرارة لشحن الفاكهة حسب متطلبات البضائع القابلة للتلف.
usageTranslations.pt: O navio frigorífico manteve ambiente controlado para transporte de frutas conforme exigências de cargas perecíveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Рефрижераторное судно поддерживало температурный режим для перевозки фруктов в соответствии с требованиями к скоропортящимся грузам.
usageTranslations.ja: 冷蔵船は生鮮貨物要件を満たすため果物の輸送で温度管理を徹底した。
usageTranslations.it: La nave frigorifera ha mantenuto un ambiente controllato per spedire frutta in conformità ai requisiti per merci deperibili.
usageTranslations.vi: Tàu lạnh duy trì môi trường kiểm soát nhiệt độ khi vận chuyển trái cây đáp ứng quy định hàng dễ hỏng.
usageTranslations.hi: रीफर पोत ने फल शिपमेंट के लिए नियंत्रित तापमान रखा, ताकि खराब होने वाली कार्गो आवश्यकताओं का पालन हो सके।
usageTranslations.th: เรือเย็นควบคุมอุณหภูมิอย่างเหมาะสมสำหรับการขนส่งผลไม้ตามข้อกำหนดของสินค้าบูดเสีย
usageTranslations.id: Kapal pendingin menjaga suhu terkontrol untuk pengiriman buah, sesuai persyaratan kargo mudah rusak.

terms.definition: A road vehicle with a flat, open bed for carrying oversized or heavy cargo, frequently referenced in waybills, CMR documents, and road transport permits.
terms.usage: The flatbed truck transported oversized machinery under a CMR waybill, meeting all legal road transport requirements.

termTranslations.ja: フラットベッドトラック
termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกพื้นเรียบ

usageTranslations.en: The flatbed truck transported oversized machinery under a CMR waybill, meeting all legal road transport requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Düz platformlu kamyon, CMR irsaliyesiyle büyük makineleri taşıdı ve tüm yasal karayolu taşıma şartlarını karşıladı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le camion plateau a transporté des machines hors gabarit sous lettre de voiture CMR, respectant toutes les exigences routières légales.
usageTranslations.de: Der Pritschenwagen transportierte übergroße Maschinen mit CMR-Frachtbrief und erfüllte alle gesetzlichen Anforderungen.
usageTranslations.es: El camión plataforma transportó maquinaria de gran tamaño bajo carta de porte CMR cumpliendo los requisitos legales.
usageTranslations.zh: 平板卡车根据CMR运单运输大型机械，符合所有道路运输法规要求。
usageTranslations.ar: نقلت الشاحنة المسطحة معدات ضخمة بموجب بوليصة شحن CMR مستوفية كافة متطلبات النقل البري القانونية.
usageTranslations.pt: O caminhão plataforma transportou máquinas sob CMR, atendendo todos os requisitos legais.
usageTranslations.ru: Бортовой грузовик перевозил негабаритное оборудование по CMR-накладной, соблюдая все требования.
usageTranslations.ja: フラットベッドトラックはCMR運送状の下で大型機械を輸送し、法規制を遵守した。
usageTranslations.it: Il camion a pianale ha trasportato macchinari fuori sagoma con CMR rispettando tutti i requisiti stradali.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe tải thùng phẳng chở máy móc cồng kềnh theo vận đơn CMR đáp ứng quy định pháp lý đường bộ.
usageTranslations.hi: फ्लैटबेड ट्रक ने CMR वेबिल के तहत भारी मशीनरी का परिवहन किया और सभी कानूनी सड़क परिवहन आवश्यकताओं को पूरा किया।
usageTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกพื้นเรียบขนส่งเครื่องจักรขนาดใหญ่ภายใต้ใบตราส่ง CMR ตรงตามข้อกำหนดทางกฎหมาย
usageTranslations.id: Truk flatbed mengangkut mesin besar dengan waybill CMR sesuai persyaratan hukum.

terms.definition: A truck or trailer with flexible curtain sides that can be drawn back for side loading/unloading of palletized goods, referenced in European road transport and CMR documents.
terms.usage: The curtainsider truck was loaded from the side with palletized goods to speed up unloading at multiple delivery points as stated in the CMR waybill.

termTranslations.ja: カーテンサイダートラック
termTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกผ้าใบข้าง

usageTranslations.en: The curtainsider truck was loaded from the side with palletized goods to speed up unloading at multiple delivery points as stated in the CMR waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Brandalı kamyon, CMR irsaliyesinde belirtildiği üzere paletli yükleri yan kapaktan yükleyerek çoklu teslimat noktalarında boşaltmayı hızlandırdı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le camion à rideaux coulissants a été chargé latéralement avec des palettes pour accélérer le déchargement sur plusieurs sites, comme indiqué dans la CMR.
usageTranslations.de: Der Planensattelzug wurde seitlich mit palettierten Waren beladen, um das Entladen an mehreren Orten gemäß CMR zu beschleunigen.
usageTranslations.es: El camión cortina lateral fue cargado lateralmente con mercancía paletizada para agilizar la descarga en varios puntos según el CMR.
usageTranslations.zh: 帘布卡车从侧面装载托盘货物，加快了多个卸货点的卸货速度，见CMR运单。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل شاحنة الستائر الجانبية بالبضائع المنصوص عليها من الجانب لتسريع التفريغ في نقاط تسليم متعددة وفقًا للـ CMR.
usageTranslations.pt: O caminhão sider foi carregado lateralmente com mercadorias paletizadas para agilizar a descarga em vários destinos, conforme CMR.
usageTranslations.ru: Тентованный грузовик был загружен сбоку палетированным грузом для ускорения выгрузки в нескольких пунктах доставки, как указано в CMR.
usageTranslations.ja: カーテンサイダートラックはCMR運送状に記載通り、複数の納品先で迅速な荷降ろしのため側面からパレット貨物を積載した。
usageTranslations.it: Il camion centinato è stato caricato lateralmente con merce pallettizzata per velocizzare lo scarico in più punti di consegna come da CMR.
usageTranslations.vi: Xe tải bạt phủ được xếp hàng từ bên hông với hàng hóa đóng pallet để tăng tốc dỡ hàng tại nhiều điểm giao hàng theo CMR.
usageTranslations.hi: CMR वेबिल के अनुसार, कर्टनसाइडर ट्रक को साइड से पैलेटेड माल से लादा गया ताकि विभिन्न डिलीवरी पॉइंट्स पर अनलोडिंग तेज हो सके।
usageTranslations.th: รถบรรทุกผ้าใบข้างขนสินค้าบนพาเลทจากด้านข้างเพื่อเร่งการขนถ่ายตาม CMR
usageTranslations.id: Truk curtainsider dimuat dari samping dengan barang palet untuk mempercepat bongkar di beberapa titik pengiriman sesuai CMR.

terms.definition: A rail freight wagon with sloped floors and bottom discharge doors, used for transporting and unloading bulk commodities like grain, coal, or minerals; referenced in UIC codes and rail waybills.
terms.usage: The hopper wagon discharged grain through bottom doors at the unloading terminal as indicated in the rail waybill.

termTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกกรวยเท

usageTranslations.en: The hopper wagon discharged grain through bottom doors at the unloading terminal as indicated in the rail waybill.
usageTranslations.tr: Hopper vagon, demiryolu taşıma senedinde belirtildiği üzere boşaltma terminalinde alt kapaklardan tahılı boşalttı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le wagon trémie a déchargé les céréales par les trappes inférieures au terminal de déchargement, selon la lettre de voiture.
usageTranslations.de: Der Schüttgutwagen entlud Getreide durch die Bodenklappen am Entladebahnhof gemäß Frachtbrief.
usageTranslations.es: El vagón tolva descargó grano por compuertas inferiores en la terminal de descarga según la carta de porte.
usageTranslations.zh: 漏斗车在卸货站通过底部门卸下了谷物，正如铁路运单所述。
usageTranslations.ar: فرغت عربة هوبر الحبوب عبر الأبواب السفلية في محطة التفريغ كما هو موضح في بوليصة الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: O vagão hopper descarregou grãos pelas portas inferiores no terminal de descarga conforme nota ferroviária.
usageTranslations.ru: Хоппер выгрузил зерно через нижние люки на терминале выгрузки, как указано в накладной.
usageTranslations.ja: ホッパーワゴンは鉄道運送状に記載の通り、荷降ろしターミナルで下部ドアから穀物を排出した。
usageTranslations.it: Il carro tramoggia ha scaricato il grano tramite sportelli inferiori al terminal, come indicato nella lettera di vettura.
usageTranslations.vi: Toa chứa rỗng đã xả ngũ cốc qua cửa đáy tại ga dỡ hàng như trong vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: हॉपर वैगन ने रेलवे वेबिल के अनुसार अनलोडिंग टर्मिनल पर निचले दरवाजों से अनाज उतारा।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกกรวยเทระบายข้าวออกทางประตูด้านล่างที่สถานีขนถ่ายตามใบส่งของ
usageTranslations.id: Gerbong hopper membongkar gandum lewat pintu bawah di terminal pembongkaran sesuai nota angkutan.

terms.definition: A rail freight wagon with a cylindrical tank body, used for transporting bulk liquids such as chemicals, fuels, or foodstuffs; referenced in UIC documentation and dangerous goods declarations.
terms.usage: The tank wagon was loaded with hazardous chemicals, with all required UIC codes and placards displayed for rail transport.

termTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกถัง

usageTranslations.en: The tank wagon was loaded with hazardous chemicals, with all required UIC codes and placards displayed for rail transport.
usageTranslations.tr: Tanker vagon, demiryolu taşımacılığı için gerekli tüm UIC kodları ve levhalarla birlikte tehlikeli kimyasallarla yüklendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le wagon citerne a été chargé de produits chimiques dangereux, tous les codes UIC et plaques requis étant affichés.
usageTranslations.de: Der Kesselwagen wurde mit Gefahrstoffen beladen, alle notwendigen UIC-Codes und Schilder waren angebracht.
usageTranslations.es: El vagón cisterna fue cargado con productos químicos peligrosos, exhibiendo todos los códigos UIC y señalizaciones requeridas.
usageTranslations.zh: 罐式货车装载了危险化学品，并张贴了所有必要的UIC代码和标志用于铁路运输。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل عربة الصهريج بمواد كيميائية خطرة مع عرض جميع رموز UIC واللافتات المطلوبة للنقل بالسكك الحديدية.
usageTranslations.pt: O vagão tanque foi carregado com produtos químicos perigosos, com todos os códigos UIC e placas exigidos para transporte ferroviário.
usageTranslations.ru: Цистерна была загружена опасными химикатами, все требуемые коды UIC и таблички были размещены.
usageTranslations.ja: タンクワゴンには危険化学物質が積まれ、UICコードと必要な標識がすべて表示されていました。
usageTranslations.it: Il carro cisterna è stato caricato con sostanze chimiche pericolose, esponendo tutti i codici UIC e le placche richieste.
usageTranslations.vi: Toa bồn đã xếp hóa chất nguy hiểm và hiển thị tất cả mã UIC, bảng cảnh báo cần thiết.
usageTranslations.hi: टैंक वैगन में सभी आवश्यक UIC कोड और संकेतक के साथ खतरनाक रसायन लादा गया।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกถังบรรทุกสารเคมีอันตรายพร้อมแสดงรหัส UIC และป้ายตามข้อกำหนดสำหรับการขนส่งทางรถไฟ
usageTranslations.id: Gerbong tangki diisi bahan kimia berbahaya beserta kode UIC dan plakat yang diwajibkan.

terms.definition: A rail wagon designed for the transport of standardized intermodal containers, allowing direct transfer between ship, rail, and road per UIC and FIATA documentation.
terms.usage: The intermodal wagon carried ISO containers from the seaport to the inland terminal, as referenced in the FIATA multimodal bill of lading.

termTranslations.ja: インターモーダルワゴン
termTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกข้ามระบบ

usageTranslations.en: The intermodal wagon carried ISO containers from the seaport to the inland terminal, as referenced in the FIATA multimodal bill of lading.
usageTranslations.tr: Intermodal vagon, FIATA çok modlu konşimentoya atıfla ISO konteynerleri limandan iç terminale taşıdı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le wagon intermodal a transporté des conteneurs ISO du port maritime au terminal intérieur selon la lettre de transport multimodal FIATA.
usageTranslations.de: Der Intermodalwagen beförderte ISO-Container vom Seehafen zum Binnen­terminal laut FIATA-Multimodal-Konnossement.
usageTranslations.es: El vagón intermodal trasladó contenedores ISO del puerto marítimo al terminal interior según el conocimiento de embarque multimodal FIATA.
usageTranslations.zh: 多式联运车根据FIATA多式联运提单从港口运送ISO集装箱到内陆终端。
usageTranslations.ar: نقلت العربة متعددة الوسائط حاويات ISO من الميناء البحري إلى المحطة الداخلية حسب بوليصة الشحن المتعدد الوسائط FIATA.
usageTranslations.pt: O vagão intermodal transportou contêineres ISO do porto marítimo ao terminal interior conforme conhecimento FIATA.
usageTranslations.ru: Интермодальный вагон перевозил ISO-контейнеры от морского порта до внутреннего терминала согласно мультимодальному коносаменту FIATA.
usageTranslations.ja: インターモーダルワゴンはFIATA複合一貫運送状に基づき、ISOコンテナを港から内陸ターミナルへ運びました。
usageTranslations.it: Il carro intermodale ha trasportato container ISO dal porto al terminal interno secondo la polizza di carico multimodale FIATA.
usageTranslations.vi: Toa liên vận chở container ISO từ cảng biển tới ga nội địa theo vận đơn FIATA.
usageTranslations.hi: इंटरमोडल वैगन ने FIATA मल्टीमॉडल बिल ऑफ लाडिंग के अनुसार बंदरगाह से आंतरिक टर्मिनल तक ISO कंटेनर पहुंचाया।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้บรรทุกข้ามระบบขนส่งตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ ISO จากท่าเรือไปยังศูนย์กลางในประเทศตามใบตราส่ง FIATA
usageTranslations.id: Gerbong intermodal membawa kontainer ISO dari pelabuhan ke terminal darat menurut FIATA multimodal bill of lading.

terms.definition: A standardized shipping container with solid walls, roof, and floor, used for general cargo in intermodal transport; referenced in carrier schedules, B/L, and ISO 6346 standards.
terms.usage: The dry container was loaded with electronics and sealed per ISO 6346 and bill of lading requirements for intermodal transport.

termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แห้ง

usageTranslations.en: The dry container was loaded with electronics and sealed per ISO 6346 and bill of lading requirements for intermodal transport.
usageTranslations.tr: Kuru konteyner, intermodal taşımacılık için ISO 6346 ve konşimento gerekliliklerine uygun olarak elektronik eşyalarla yüklendi ve mühürlendi.
usageTranslations.fr: Le conteneur sec a été chargé d’électronique et scellé conformément à la norme ISO 6346 et aux exigences de la lettre de transport.
usageTranslations.de: Der Trockencontainer wurde mit Elektronik gemäß ISO 6346 und Konnossement-Vorschriften für den intermodalen Transport beladen und versiegelt.
usageTranslations.es: El contenedor seco fue cargado con productos electrónicos y sellado según ISO 6346 y el conocimiento de embarque para transporte intermodal.
usageTranslations.zh: 干货集装箱装载了电子产品，并根据ISO 6346和提单要求封签用于联运。
usageTranslations.ar: تم تحميل الحاوية الجافة بالإلكترونيات وختمها وفقًا لمتطلبات ISO 6346 وبوليصة الشحن للنقل المتعدد الوسائط.
usageTranslations.pt: O contêiner seco foi carregado com eletrônicos e lacrado conforme ISO 6346 e requisitos do conhecimento de embarque.
usageTranslations.ru: Сухой контейнер был загружен электроникой и опломбирован в соответствии с ISO 6346 и требованиями коносамента для мультимодальных перевозок.
usageTranslations.ja: ドライコンテナには電子機器が積まれ、ISO 6346および船荷証券の要件に従って封印されました。
usageTranslations.it: Il container secco è stato caricato con elettronica e sigillato secondo ISO 6346 e la polizza di carico per trasporto intermodale.
usageTranslations.vi: Container khô chứa hàng điện tử và niêm phong theo ISO 6346, vận đơn liên vận.
usageTranslations.hi: ड्राई कंटेनर को ISO 6346 और बिल ऑफ लाडिंग के अनुसार इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स से लादकर सील किया गया।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แห้งบรรจุสินค้าอิเล็กทรอนิกส์และปิดผนึกตามมาตรฐาน ISO 6346 และบิลขนส่ง
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer kering diisi elektronik dan disegel sesuai ISO 6346 dan bill of lading untuk intermodal.

terms.definition: A shipping container with a removable roof or tarpaulin, used for oversized or bulk cargo loaded from the top; referenced in carrier instructions and B/L documentation.
terms.usage: The open top container was used for loading heavy machinery by crane, as specified in the carrier’s instructions and bill of lading.

termTranslations.ja: オープントップコンテナ
termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์เปิดหลังคา

usageTranslations.en: The open top container was used for loading heavy machinery by crane, as specified in the carrier’s instructions and bill of lading.
usageTranslations.tr: Üstü açık konteyner, taşıyıcı talimatları ve konşimentoya uygun olarak vinçle ağır makinelerin yüklenmesinde kullanıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le conteneur open top a été utilisé pour charger des machines lourdes à la grue, comme indiqué dans les instructions du transporteur et la lettre de transport.
usageTranslations.de: Der Open-Top-Container wurde für das Beladen von Schwergut per Kran gemäß Anweisungen des Carriers und Konnossement verwendet.
usageTranslations.es: El contenedor open top se utilizó para cargar maquinaria pesada con grúa según las instrucciones del transportista y el conocimiento de embarque.
usageTranslations.zh: 开顶集装箱根据承运人指示和提单，使用起重机装载重型机械。
usageTranslations.ar: تم استخدام الحاوية مفتوحة السقف لتحميل المعدات الثقيلة بواسطة رافعة حسب تعليمات الناقل وبوليصة الشحن.
usageTranslations.pt: O contêiner open top foi usado para carregar máquinas pesadas por guindaste conforme instruções do armador e conhecimento.
usageTranslations.ru: Контейнер с открытым верхом использовался для погрузки тяжёлого оборудования краном согласно инструкциям перевозчика и коносаменту.
usageTranslations.ja: オープントップコンテナはキャリアの指示と船荷証券に従いクレーンで重機積載に使われた。
usageTranslations.it: Il container open top è stato utilizzato per caricare macchinari pesanti tramite gru come da istruzioni del vettore e polizza di carico.
usageTranslations.vi: Container mở nóc dùng để bốc xếp máy móc nặng bằng cần cẩu theo hướng dẫn của hãng vận chuyển và vận đơn.
usageTranslations.hi: ओपन टॉप कंटेनर का उपयोग क्रेन द्वारा भारी मशीनरी लोड करने के लिए किया गया जैसा कि कैरियर के निर्देश और बिल ऑफ लाडिंग में निर्दिष्ट है।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์เปิดหลังคาใช้สำหรับบรรทุกเครื่องจักรหนักด้วยเครนตามใบส่งของและคำสั่งขนส่ง
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer open top digunakan untuk muat mesin berat dengan crane sesuai instruksi carrier dan bill of lading.

terms.definition: A heavy-duty tie-down device with a ratcheting mechanism, used to secure cargo to transport platforms, vehicles, or containers; essential for compliance with cargo securing regulations in road, sea, and air freight.
terms.usage: All cargo on the flatbed truck must be secured with at least two ratchet straps as per EN 12195-2 requirements.

termTranslations.ja: ラチェットストラップ
termTranslations.th: สายรัดแบบวงล้อ

usageTranslations.en: All cargo on the flatbed truck must be secured with at least two ratchet straps as per EN 12195-2 requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Düz kasa kamyondaki tüm yükler, EN 12195-2 gereği en az iki gerdirme kayışıyla sabitlenmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Toutes les marchandises sur le camion plateau doivent être sécurisées avec au moins deux sangles à cliquet selon la norme EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.de: Sämtliche Ladung auf dem Pritschen-LKW muss gemäß EN 12195-2 mit mindestens zwei Spannratschen gesichert werden.
usageTranslations.es: Toda la carga en el camión plataforma debe asegurarse con al menos dos cinchas de carraca según la norma EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据EN 12195-2要求，所有在平板卡车上的货物必须至少用两根棘轮绑带固定。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تأمين جميع البضائع على الشاحنة المسطحة باستخدام حزامين شد بالرافعة على الأقل وفقًا لمتطلبات EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.pt: Toda a carga no caminhão plataforma deve ser presa com pelo menos duas cintas catraca conforme EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.ru: Вся груз на платформе должен быть закреплен как минимум двумя ремнями с храповиком согласно EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.ja: 平床トラックの全貨物はEN 12195-2規格に従い、少なくとも2本のラチェットストラップで固定する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Tutti i carichi sul camion pianale devono essere fissati con almeno due cinghie a cricchetto secondo EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả hàng hóa trên xe tải phải được buộc bằng ít nhất hai dây đai răng cưa theo tiêu chuẩn EN 12195-2.
usageTranslations.hi: फ्लैटबेड ट्रक पर सभी कार्गो को EN 12195-2 के अनुसार कम से कम दो रैचेट स्ट्रैप से सुरक्षित किया जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: สินค้าทั้งหมดบนรถบรรทุกต้องรัดด้วยสายรัดแบบวงล้ออย่างน้อยสองเส้นตามมาตรฐาน EN 12195-2
usageTranslations.id: Semua kargo di truk flatbed harus diamankan dengan minimal dua tali ratchet sesuai EN 12195-2.

terms.definition: An insulated, temperature-controlled ISO shipping container equipped with a refrigeration unit for transporting perishable cargo such as food, pharmaceuticals, and chemicals.
terms.usage: The shipment of fresh produce requires a reefer container to maintain a controlled temperature throughout the entire transport chain.

termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ควบคุมอุณหภูมิ

usageTranslations.en: The shipment of fresh produce requires a reefer container to maintain a controlled temperature throughout the entire transport chain.
usageTranslations.tr: Taze ürün sevkiyatı, tüm taşıma zinciri boyunca kontrollü sıcaklığın korunması için soğutuculu konteyner gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L'expédition de produits frais nécessite un conteneur frigorifique pour maintenir une température contrôlée tout au long de la chaîne de transport.
usageTranslations.de: Der Versand von Frischwaren erfordert einen Kühlcontainer, um während der gesamten Transportkette eine kontrollierte Temperatur aufrechtzuerhalten.
usageTranslations.es: El envío de productos frescos requiere un contenedor reefer para mantener una temperatura controlada en toda la cadena de transporte.
usageTranslations.zh: 新鲜农产品的运输需要使用冷藏集装箱，以确保整个运输链温度受控。
usageTranslations.ar: يتطلب شحن المنتجات الطازجة حاوية مبردة للحفاظ على درجة حرارة مضبوطة طوال سلسلة النقل.
usageTranslations.pt: O envio de produtos frescos exige um contentor reefer para manter a temperatura controlada durante toda a cadeia de transporte.
usageTranslations.ru: Для перевозки свежих продуктов требуется рефрижераторный контейнер для поддержания контролируемой температуры на всём протяжении транспортировки.
usageTranslations.ja: 生鮮品の輸送には、輸送全体を通じて温度管理ができるリーファーコンテナが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: La spedizione di prodotti freschi richiede un container frigorifero per mantenere una temperatura controllata lungo tutta la catena di trasporto.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc vận chuyển hàng tươi sống cần container lạnh để duy trì nhiệt độ kiểm soát trong suốt chuỗi vận chuyển.
usageTranslations.hi: ताजा उत्पादों की शिपमेंट के लिए पूरे ट्रांसपोर्ट चेन में नियंत्रित तापमान बनाए रखने हेतु रीफर कंटेनर आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การขนส่งสินค้าสดต้องใช้ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ควบคุมอุณหภูมิเพื่อรักษาอุณหภูมิที่เหมาะสมตลอดทั้งโซ่การขนส่ง
usageTranslations.id: Pengiriman produk segar memerlukan kontainer berpendingin untuk menjaga suhu terkendali sepanjang rantai transportasi.

terms.definition: A cylindrical, intermodal ISO container used for the safe transport of bulk liquids, gases, and powders under regulated conditions, built to UN portable tank standards.
terms.usage: Bulk chemical shipments must use a tank container that complies with IMDG and UN portable tank regulations for safety and handling.

termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แทงค์

usageTranslations.en: Bulk chemical shipments must use a tank container that complies with IMDG and UN portable tank regulations for safety and handling.
usageTranslations.tr: Dökme kimyasal sevkiyatlarında güvenlik ve taşıma için IMDG ve UN taşınabilir tank düzenlemelerine uygun tank konteyner kullanılmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les expéditions en vrac de produits chimiques doivent utiliser un conteneur citerne conforme aux réglementations IMDG et UN.
usageTranslations.de: Für den Transport von Chemikalien in großen Mengen muss ein Tankcontainer verwendet werden, der den IMDG- und UN-Vorschriften entspricht.
usageTranslations.es: Los envíos de productos químicos a granel deben utilizar un contenedor cisterna conforme a las regulaciones IMDG y UN.
usageTranslations.zh: 散装化学品运输必须使用符合IMDG和联合国便携式罐规定的罐式集装箱以确保安全和操作。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تستخدم شحنات المواد الكيميائية السائبة حاوية صهريجية متوافقة مع لوائح IMDG وخزانات الأمم المتحدة المحمولة للسلامة والمناولة.
usageTranslations.pt: Remessas de produtos químicos a granel devem usar contentor cisterna conforme as normas IMDG e UN.
usageTranslations.ru: Для перевозки химикатов навалом должен использоваться танк-контейнер, соответствующий требованиям IMDG и ООН.
usageTranslations.ja: バルク化学品の輸送には、IMDGや国連の規制に準拠したタンクコンテナが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Le spedizioni di prodotti chimici sfusi devono utilizzare container cisterna conformi alle normative IMDG e ONU.
usageTranslations.vi: Vận chuyển hóa chất số lượng lớn phải sử dụng container bồn tuân thủ quy định IMDG và UN.
usageTranslations.hi: थोक रसायन शिपमेंट के लिए IMDG और UN मानकों के अनुरूप टैंक कंटेनर आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การขนส่งเคมีภัณฑ์จำนวนมากต้องใช้ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แทงค์ที่เป็นไปตามข้อกำหนด IMDG และ UN
usageTranslations.id: Pengiriman bahan kimia curah harus menggunakan kontainer tangki yang sesuai dengan regulasi IMDG dan UN.

terms.definition: A general term for containers without a fixed roof, including open-top and open-side containers, used for oversize, heavy, or irregular cargo that cannot fit standard containers.
terms.usage: Open containers are frequently used to ship heavy machinery that cannot be loaded into standard containers due to height restrictions.

termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์เปิด

usageTranslations.en: Open containers are frequently used to ship heavy machinery that cannot be loaded into standard containers due to height restrictions.
usageTranslations.tr: Açık konteynerler, yüksekliğinden dolayı standart konteynerlere sığmayan ağır makinelerin taşınmasında sıkça kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les conteneurs ouverts sont souvent utilisés pour expédier des machines lourdes qui ne rentrent pas dans des conteneurs standards à cause de la hauteur.
usageTranslations.de: Offene Container werden häufig zum Transport von schweren Maschinen eingesetzt, die aufgrund ihrer Höhe nicht in Standardcontainer passen.
usageTranslations.es: Los contenedores abiertos se utilizan frecuentemente para transportar maquinaria pesada que no cabe en contenedores estándar por restricciones de altura.
usageTranslations.zh: 开顶集装箱常用于运输因高度限制无法装入标准集装箱的大型机械设备。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الحاويات المفتوحة بشكل متكرر لنقل الآلات الثقيلة التي لا يمكن تحميلها في الحاويات القياسية بسبب قيود الارتفاع.
usageTranslations.pt: Contentores abertos são frequentemente utilizados para transportar maquinaria pesada que não cabe em contentores standard devido a restrições de altura.
usageTranslations.ru: Открытые контейнеры часто используются для перевозки тяжёлой техники, которая не помещается в стандартные контейнеры из-за ограничений по высоте.
usageTranslations.ja: オープンコンテナは、標準コンテナに収まらない大型機械の輸送によく使われます。
usageTranslations.it: I container aperti sono spesso utilizzati per il trasporto di macchinari pesanti che non possono essere caricati nei container standard a causa delle restrizioni di altezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Container mở thường được sử dụng để vận chuyển máy móc nặng không thể cho vào container tiêu chuẩn do hạn chế chiều cao.
usageTranslations.hi: ऊँचाई प्रतिबंध के कारण जो भारी मशीनरी मानक कंटेनरों में नहीं आती, उसके लिए ओपन कंटेनर का उपयोग होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์เปิดมักใช้ขนส่งเครื่องจักรหนักที่ไม่สามารถใส่ตู้มาตรฐานได้เนื่องจากข้อจำกัดด้านความสูง
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer terbuka sering digunakan untuk mengangkut mesin berat yang tidak muat dalam kontainer standar karena batasan tinggi.

terms.definition: A container platform with fixed or collapsible end walls, used for transporting heavy, oversize, or awkwardly shaped cargo that cannot be loaded in standard containers.
terms.usage: A flat rack is essential for moving construction equipment and vehicles that exceed the width or height limits of closed containers.

termTranslations.th: แฟลตร็อค

usageTranslations.en: A flat rack is essential for moving construction equipment and vehicles that exceed the width or height limits of closed containers.
usageTranslations.tr: Kapalı konteynerlerin genişlik veya yükseklik sınırlarını aşan inşaat ekipmanları ve araçlarının taşınmasında flat rack gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un flat rack est essentiel pour transporter du matériel de construction dépassant les limites de largeur ou de hauteur des conteneurs fermés.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Flat Rack ist unerlässlich für den Transport von Baumaschinen, die die Breiten- oder Höhenbegrenzungen geschlossener Container überschreiten.
usageTranslations.es: Un flat rack es esencial para transportar equipos de construcción que exceden los límites de ancho o altura de los contenedores cerrados.
usageTranslations.zh: 平板集装箱对运输超出封闭式集装箱宽度或高度限制的建筑设备和车辆至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: مسطح الحمالات ضروري لنقل المعدات الثقيلة والمركبات التي تتجاوز حدود العرض أو الارتفاع للحاويات المغلقة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um flat rack é essencial para transportar equipamentos de construção que excedem os limites de largura ou altura dos contentores fechados.
usageTranslations.ru: Флэт-рэк необходим для перевозки строительной техники, превышающей ширину или высоту закрытых контейнеров.
usageTranslations.ja: フラットラックは、クローズドコンテナの幅や高さを超える建設機械の輸送に不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Un flat rack è essenziale per il trasporto di attrezzature edili che superano i limiti di larghezza o altezza dei container chiusi.
usageTranslations.vi: Flat rack cần thiết để vận chuyển thiết bị xây dựng vượt quá giới hạn chiều rộng hoặc chiều cao của container kín.
usageTranslations.hi: फ्लैट रैक का उपयोग ऐसे निर्माण उपकरण और वाहनों के लिए अनिवार्य है जो बंद कंटेनरों की चौड़ाई या ऊँचाई सीमा से बड़े हैं।
usageTranslations.th: แฟลตร็อคจำเป็นสำหรับขนส่งอุปกรณ์ก่อสร้างที่เกินข้อจำกัดด้านความกว้างหรือความสูงของตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ปิด
usageTranslations.id: Flat rack penting untuk mengangkut peralatan konstruksi dan kendaraan yang melebihi batas lebar atau tinggi kontainer tertutup.

terms.definition: A reinforced flat platform without side or end walls, used to transport oversized, heavy, or unconventional cargo that cannot fit in standard or closed containers.
terms.usage: Platform containers are ideal for transporting cargo that exceeds the length, width, or weight restrictions of standard containers.

termTranslations.ja: プラットフォームコンテナ
termTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แพลตฟอร์ม

usageTranslations.en: Platform containers are ideal for transporting cargo that exceeds the length, width, or weight restrictions of standard containers.
usageTranslations.tr: Platform konteynerler, standart konteynerlerin uzunluk, genişlik veya ağırlık sınırlarını aşan yüklerin taşınması için idealdir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les conteneurs plateforme sont idéaux pour le transport de marchandises dépassant les limites de longueur, largeur ou poids des conteneurs standards.
usageTranslations.de: Plattformcontainer sind ideal für den Transport von Ladungen, die die Längen-, Breiten- oder Gewichtsbeschränkungen von Standardcontainern überschreiten.
usageTranslations.es: Los contenedores plataforma son ideales para transportar cargas que exceden las restricciones de longitud, ancho o peso de los contenedores estándar.
usageTranslations.zh: 平台集装箱非常适合运输超过标准集装箱长度、宽度或重量限制的货物。
usageTranslations.ar: حاويات المنصة مثالية لنقل البضائع التي تتجاوز قيود الطول أو العرض أو الوزن للحاويات القياسية.
usageTranslations.pt: Contentores plataforma são ideais para o transporte de cargas que excedem os limites de comprimento, largura ou peso dos contentores padrão.
usageTranslations.ru: Платформенные контейнеры идеальны для перевозки грузов, превышающих ограничения по длине, ширине или весу стандартных контейнеров.
usageTranslations.ja: プラットフォームコンテナは、標準コンテナの長さ、幅、重量制限を超える貨物の輸送に最適です。
usageTranslations.it: I container piattaforma sono ideali per il trasporto di merci che superano le restrizioni di lunghezza, larghezza o peso dei container standard.
usageTranslations.vi: Container nền lý tưởng để vận chuyển hàng hóa vượt quá giới hạn chiều dài, chiều rộng hoặc trọng lượng của container tiêu chuẩn.
usageTranslations.hi: प्लेटफार्म कंटेनर उन कार्गो के लिए आदर्श है जो मानक कंटेनर की लंबाई, चौड़ाई या वजन सीमा से अधिक है।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์แพลตฟอร์มเหมาะสำหรับขนส่งสินค้าที่เกินข้อจำกัดของตู้มาตรฐานในด้านความยาว ความกว้าง หรือ น้ำหนัก
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer platform sangat ideal untuk mengangkut kargo yang melebihi batas panjang, lebar, atau berat dari kontainer standar.

terms.definition: A mechanical locking device mounted on a container ship, rail wagon, or truck chassis, designed to secure ISO containers in place by twisting action, complying with ISO 1161 standards.
terms.usage: Containers must be fastened to the flatcar using twist locks that meet ISO 1161 requirements.

termTranslations.th: ทวิสต์ล็อค

usageTranslations.en: Containers must be fastened to the flatcar using twist locks that meet ISO 1161 requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Konteynerler, ISO 1161 standartlarına uygun twist lock’lar ile vagona sabitlenmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les conteneurs doivent être fixés au wagon à l’aide de twist locks conformes à la norme ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.de: Container müssen mit Twistlocks, die den Anforderungen der ISO 1161 entsprechen, auf dem Flachwagen befestigt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los contenedores deben fijarse al vagón con twistlocks que cumplan la norma ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.zh: 集装箱必须使用符合ISO 1161标准的旋锁固定在平车上。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تثبيت الحاويات على العربة باستخدام أقفال التواء مطابقة لمعيار ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.pt: Os contêineres devem ser fixados no vagão com twist locks que atendam à ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.ru: Контейнеры должны быть закреплены на платформе с помощью твистлоков, соответствующих ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.ja: コンテナはISO 1161規格に適合するツイストロックでフラットカーに固定する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: I container devono essere fissati al carro pianale con twist lock conformi alla norma ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.vi: Các container phải được cố định trên toa bằng khóa vặn đáp ứng tiêu chuẩn ISO 1161.
usageTranslations.hi: कंटेनरों को फ्लैटकैर पर ISO 1161 मानक के ट्विस्ट लॉक से बांधा जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ตู้คอนเทนเนอร์ต้องยึดกับรถแคร่โดยใช้ทวิสต์ล็อคที่เป็นไปตามข้อกำหนด ISO 1161
usageTranslations.id: Kontainer harus dipasang pada flatcar dengan twist lock yang memenuhi ISO 1161.

terms.definition: A steel bar designed to connect container lashing equipment, providing additional securing points for chains or rods in vessel or flatbed transport.
terms.usage: The lashing bars must be fitted to the lower lashing points on the vessel deck for proper securing.

termTranslations.th: แท่งรัดของ

usageTranslations.en: The lashing bars must be fitted to the lower lashing points on the vessel deck for proper securing.
usageTranslations.tr: Lashing bar’lar, güverte üzerindeki alt sabitleme noktalarına yerleştirilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les barres de saisissage doivent être placées aux points de saisissage inférieurs du pont du navire.
usageTranslations.de: Laschbarren müssen an den unteren Laschpunkten des Schiffsdecks befestigt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Las barras de trinca deben colocarse en los puntos de trinca inferiores de la cubierta del buque.
usageTranslations.zh: 绑扎杆必须安装在船甲板的下部绑扎点。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تثبيت قضبان التثبيت في نقاط التثبيت السفلية على سطح السفينة.
usageTranslations.pt: As barras de amarração devem ser fixadas nos pontos inferiores do convés.
usageTranslations.ru: Лашбары должны быть установлены на нижних точках крепления палубы судна.
usageTranslations.ja: ラッシュバーは船のデッキ下部の固定ポイントに取り付ける必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le barre di fissaggio devono essere fissate ai punti inferiori della coperta della nave.
usageTranslations.vi: Thanh buộc hàng phải được lắp vào các điểm buộc dưới trên boong tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: लैश बार को जहाज की डेक के निचले फिक्सिंग पॉइंट्स पर लगाया जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องติดตั้งแท่งรัดของที่จุดรัดของด้านล่างของดาดฟ้าเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Batang lashing harus dipasang pada titik bawah di dek kapal.

terms.definition: A high-tensile chain used in maritime, rail, and heavy road transport to secure cargo and containers, providing robust tension and shock absorption.
terms.usage: Heavy machinery on deck must be secured with lashing chains in compliance with IMDG Code and vessel safety regulations.

termTranslations.th: โซ่รัดของ

usageTranslations.en: Heavy machinery on deck must be secured with lashing chains in compliance with IMDG Code and vessel safety regulations.
usageTranslations.tr: Güverte üzerindeki ağır makineler, IMDG Kod ve gemi güvenlik kurallarına uygun olarak lashing zinciri ile sabitlenmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les machines lourdes sur le pont doivent être sécurisées avec des chaînes de saisissage conformément au Code IMDG et aux réglementations de sécurité du navire.
usageTranslations.de: Schwere Maschinen an Deck müssen mit Laschketten gemäß IMDG-Code und Sicherheitsvorschriften des Schiffs gesichert werden.
usageTranslations.es: La maquinaria pesada en cubierta debe asegurarse con cadenas de trinca conforme al Código IMDG y las normas de seguridad del buque.
usageTranslations.zh: 甲板上的重型机械必须按照IMDG规则和船舶安全法规用绑扎链固定。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تأمين المعدات الثقيلة على السطح بسلاسل تثبيت وفقًا لكود IMDG وأنظمة السلامة على السفن.
usageTranslations.pt: Máquinas pesadas no convés devem ser presas com correntes de amarração conforme o Código IMDG e regulamentos de segurança da embarcação.
usageTranslations.ru: Тяжелая техника на палубе должна быть закреплена лашинговыми цепями согласно IMDG Code и правилам безопасности судна.
usageTranslations.ja: デッキ上の重機はIMDGコードと船舶安全規則に従い、ラッシングチェーンで固定する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le macchine pesanti sul ponte devono essere fissate con catene di fissaggio conformi al Codice IMDG e alle norme di sicurezza della nave.
usageTranslations.vi: Máy móc nặng trên boong phải được buộc bằng xích buộc hàng theo IMDG Code và quy định an toàn tàu.
usageTranslations.hi: डेक पर भारी मशीनरी को IMDG कोड और जहाज सुरक्षा नियमों के अनुसार लैशिंग चेन से सुरक्षित किया जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: เครื่องจักรหนักบนดาดฟ้าต้องรัดด้วยโซ่รัดของตามข้อกำหนด IMDG และระเบียบความปลอดภัยของเรือ
usageTranslations.id: Mesin berat di dek harus diamankan dengan rantai lashing sesuai IMDG Code dan peraturan keselamatan kapal.

terms.definition: A standardized wooden pallet measuring 1200×800 mm, compliant with European Pallet Association (EPAL) specifications and widely used for unitizing cargo in road, rail, and intermodal transport.
terms.usage: Goods loaded on Euro pallets can be quickly transferred between trucks and warehouses across Europe due to standardization.

termTranslations.th: พาเลทยุโรป

usageTranslations.en: Goods loaded on Euro pallets can be quickly transferred between trucks and warehouses across Europe due to standardization.
usageTranslations.tr: Euro paletlere yüklenen mallar, standardizasyon sayesinde Avrupa genelinde kamyon ve depolar arasında hızlıca aktarılabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les marchandises sur palettes Europe peuvent être rapidement transférées entre camions et entrepôts grâce à la standardisation.
usageTranslations.de: Waren auf Europaletten können dank Standardisierung schnell zwischen LKWs und Lagern in ganz Europa umgeschlagen werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los bienes en europalets se transfieren rápidamente entre camiones y almacenes en toda Europa gracias a la estandarización.
usageTranslations.zh: 由于标准化，装载在欧式托盘上的货物可以在整个欧洲的卡车和仓库之间快速转运。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن نقل البضائع المحملة على المنصات الأوروبية بسرعة بين الشاحنات والمستودعات في جميع أنحاء أوروبا بسبب التوحيد القياسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Mercadorias em paletes Euro podem ser rapidamente transferidas entre caminhões e armazéns em toda a Europa devido à padronização.
usageTranslations.ru: Грузы на европоддонах быстро перемещаются между грузовиками и складами по всей Европе благодаря стандартизации.
usageTranslations.ja: ユーロパレットに積載された貨物は、標準化によりヨーロッパ中のトラックや倉庫間で迅速に移動できます。
usageTranslations.it: La merce su europallet può essere rapidamente trasferita tra camion e magazzini in tutta Europa grazie alla standardizzazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Hàng hóa đặt trên pallet châu Âu có thể chuyển đổi nhanh giữa xe tải và kho ở khắp châu Âu nhờ tiêu chuẩn hóa.
usageTranslations.hi: यूरो पैलेट पर लदी वस्तुएं मानकीकरण के कारण पूरे यूरोप में ट्रकों और गोदामों के बीच जल्दी स्थानांतरित हो सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: สินค้าที่บรรทุกบนพาเลทยุโรปสามารถถ่ายโอนระหว่างรถบรรทุกและคลังสินค้าได้อย่างรวดเร็วทั่วทั้งยุโรปเนื่องจากมาตรฐานเดียวกัน
usageTranslations.id: Barang di pallet Euro dapat dengan cepat dipindahkan antara truk dan gudang di seluruh Eropa berkat standarisasi.

terms.definition: A secondary containment pallet designed to catch leaks or spills from drums or IBCs, compliant with environmental safety regulations for hazardous liquids storage and transport.
terms.usage: Hazardous chemicals stored on spill pallets comply with EPA and ADR safety requirements for secondary containment.

termTranslations.th: พาเลทรองรับของเหลวหก

usageTranslations.en: Hazardous chemicals stored on spill pallets comply with EPA and ADR safety requirements for secondary containment.
usageTranslations.tr: Sızıntı paletleri üzerinde depolanan tehlikeli kimyasallar, EPA ve ADR ikincil koruma güvenlik gereksinimlerini karşılar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les produits chimiques dangereux stockés sur des palettes de rétention respectent les normes EPA et ADR de confinement secondaire.
usageTranslations.de: Gefährliche Chemikalien auf Auffangpaletten entsprechen den EPA- und ADR-Anforderungen für Sekundärschutz.
usageTranslations.es: Los productos químicos peligrosos almacenados en palets de retención cumplen con los requisitos de seguridad EPA y ADR.
usageTranslations.zh: 储存在防泄漏托盘上的危险化学品符合EPA和ADR二级防护要求。
usageTranslations.ar: المواد الكيميائية الخطرة المخزنة على منصات احتواء الانسكاب تفي بمتطلبات السلامة الثانوية من EPA وADR.
usageTranslations.pt: Produtos químicos perigosos em paletes de contenção atendem aos requisitos de segurança EPA e ADR para contenção secundária.
usageTranslations.ru: Опасные химикаты на противопроливных поддонах соответствуют требованиям EPA и ADR по вторичному сдерживанию.
usageTranslations.ja: スピルパレットに保管された有害化学品はEPAおよびADRの二次防護要件に準拠しています。
usageTranslations.it: Le sostanze chimiche pericolose stoccate su pallet di contenimento rispettano i requisiti di sicurezza EPA e ADR per il contenimento secondario.
usageTranslations.vi: Hóa chất nguy hiểm lưu trữ trên pallet chống tràn tuân thủ yêu cầu an toàn EPA và ADR.
usageTranslations.hi: स्पिल पैलेट पर संग्रहीत खतरनाक रसायन EPA और ADR की द्वितीयक सुरक्षा आवश्यकताओं का पालन करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: สารเคมีอันตรายที่จัดเก็บบนพาเลทรองรับของเหลวหกเป็นไปตามข้อกำหนดความปลอดภัย EPA และ ADR
usageTranslations.id: Bahan kimia berbahaya yang disimpan di pallet penahan tumpahan memenuhi persyaratan keselamatan EPA dan ADR untuk penahanan sekunder.

terms.definition: A thin, flat sheet made of fiberboard or plastic, used as an alternative to pallets for unitizing cargo, moved using push-pull attachments on forklifts.
terms.usage: Slip sheets reduce shipping weight and costs compared to traditional pallets, but require special forklift attachments for handling.

termTranslations.th: แผ่นสลิปชีท

usageTranslations.en: Slip sheets reduce shipping weight and costs compared to traditional pallets, but require special forklift attachments for handling.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaydırma tablaları, geleneksel paletlere göre nakliye ağırlığını ve maliyetini azaltır; ancak özel forklift ataşmanları gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les feuilles de glissement réduisent le poids et le coût d'expédition par rapport aux palettes traditionnelles, mais nécessitent des accessoires de chariot élévateur spéciaux.
usageTranslations.de: Slip Sheets verringern Versandgewicht und -kosten gegenüber herkömmlichen Paletten, erfordern jedoch spezielle Gabelstapleraufsätze.
usageTranslations.es: Las hojas deslizantes reducen el peso y el coste del envío frente a los palets tradicionales, pero requieren accesorios especiales de carretilla elevadora.
usageTranslations.zh: 与传统托盘相比，滑托板能减少运输重量和成本，但需要专用叉车附件进行操作。
usageTranslations.ar: تقلل الورقة الانزلاقية الوزن وتكلفة الشحن مقارنة بالمنصات التقليدية ولكنها تتطلب ملحقات رافعة شوكية خاصة.
usageTranslations.pt: Slip sheets reduzem o peso e o custo do envio em relação às paletes tradicionais, mas requerem acessórios especiais para empilhadeiras.
usageTranslations.ru: Скользящие листы уменьшают вес и стоимость перевозки по сравнению с традиционными поддонами, но требуют специальных приспособлений для погрузчиков.
usageTranslations.ja: スリップシートは従来のパレットに比べて輸送重量とコストを削減しますが、専用のフォークリフトアタッチメントが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Gli slip sheet riducono peso e costi di spedizione rispetto ai pallet tradizionali, ma richiedono accessori speciali per carrelli elevatori.
usageTranslations.vi: Tấm trượt giúp giảm trọng lượng và chi phí vận chuyển so với pallet truyền thống, nhưng cần thiết bị nâng chuyên dụng.
usageTranslations.hi: स्लिप शीट पारंपरिक पैलेट्स की तुलना में शिपिंग वजन और लागत कम करता है, लेकिन इसके लिए विशेष फोर्कलिफ्ट अटैचमेंट चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: แผ่นสลิปชีทช่วยลดน้ำหนักและต้นทุนขนส่งเทียบกับพาเลทแบบดั้งเดิม แต่ต้องใช้อุปกรณ์เสริมรถยกพิเศษ
usageTranslations.id: Slip sheet mengurangi berat dan biaya pengiriman dibandingkan palet tradisional, namun memerlukan alat khusus pada forklift.

terms.definition: A flat metal or heavy-duty plastic plate used for distributing loads or bridging gaps during cargo transfer, loading, or unloading in logistics operations.
terms.usage: Load plates are essential for bridging the gap between loading docks and trucks during material handling.

termTranslations.th: แผ่นรับน้ำหนัก

usageTranslations.en: Load plates are essential for bridging the gap between loading docks and trucks during material handling.
usageTranslations.tr: Yükleme plakaları, malzeme taşıma sırasında yükleme rampaları ile kamyonlar arasındaki boşluğu kapatmak için gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les plaques de chargement sont essentielles pour combler l'écart entre les quais de chargement et les camions lors de la manutention.
